Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** * Natural numbers and their properties. Vladimir Voevodsky. Apr. - Sep. 2011

This file contains the formulations and proofs of general properties of natural
numbers from the univalent perspecive. *)
(** ** Contents
- Equality and inequality on [nat]
 - Basic properties of [paths] on [nat] and the proofs of [isdeceq] and [isaset]
   for [nat]
 - [S : nat -> nat] is a decidable inclusion
- Inequalities on [nat]
 - Boolean "less of equal" and "greater or equal" on [nat]
 - Semi-boolean "greater" on [nat] or [natgth]
 - Semi-boolean "less" on [nat] or [natlth]
 - Semi-boolean "less or equal" on [nat] or [natleh]
 - Semi-boolean "greater or equal" on [nat] or [natgeh]
 - Simple implications between comparisons
 - Comparison alternatives
 - Mixed transitivities
 - Two comparisons and [S]
 - Comparison alternatives and [S]
- Some properties of [plus] on [nat]
 - The structure of the additive abelian monoid on [nat]
 - Addition and comparisons
 - Comparisons and [n -> n + 1]
 - Two comparisons and [n -> n + 1]
 - Comparison alternatives and [n -> n + 1]
 - Cancellation properties of [plus] on [nat]
 - Some properties of [minus] on [nat]
 - Basic algebraic properties of [mul] on [nat]
 - [nat] as a commutative rig
 - Cancellation properties of [mul] on [nat]
 - Multiplication and comparisons
 - Properties of comparisons in the terminology of algebra1.v
 - Submonoid of non-zero elements in [nat]
 - Division with a remainder on [nat]
 - Exponentiation [natpower n m] ("n to the power of m") on [nat]
 - Factorial on [nat]
- The order-preserving functions [di i : nat -> nat] whose image is the
  complement of one element [i].
- The order-preserving functions [si i : nat -> nat] that take the value [i]
  twice.
- Inductive types [le] with values in [UU]
 - A generalization of [le] and its properties
 - Inductive types [le] with values in [UU] are in [hProp]
 - Comparison between [le] with values in [UU] and [natleh]
*)


(** ** Preamble *)

(** Imports. *)
Require Export UniMath.Foundations.Sets.

(** To up-stream files  *)


(** ** Equality and inequality on [nat] *)

(* we will write m ≠ n for algorithmic inequality and ¬(m = n) for negation of
   equality *)

Definition natnegpaths (x y : nat) : hProp := make_hProp (x != y) (isapropneg _).

Fixpoint natneq_hProp (n m : nat) : hProp :=
  match n, m with
  | S n, S m => natneq_hProp n m
  | O, O => hfalse
  | _, _ => htrue
  end.

(* Provisional notation, to be replaced below: *)
Notation " x ≠ y " := (natneq_hProp x y) (at level 70, no associativity) : nat_scope.


x: nat
0 != S x


x: nat
0 != S x

  
x: nat
f:= λ n : nat,
match n with
| 0 => true
| S _ => false
end: nat → bool
0 != S x

  apply (negf (@maponpaths _ _ f 0 (S x)) nopathstruetofalse).
Defined.


x: nat
S x != 0


x: nat
S x != 0

  
x: nat
X: S x = 0
∅
 apply (negpaths0sx x (pathsinv0  X)).
Defined.


n, m: nat
S n = S m → n = m


n, m: nat
S n = S m → n = m

  
n, m: nat
e: S n = S m
n = m

  
n, m: nat
e: S n = S m
f:= λ n : nat, match n with
           | 0 => 0
           | S m => m
           end: nat → nat
n = m

  apply (@maponpaths _ _ f (S n) (S m) e).
Defined.


x, x': nat
x != x' → S x != S x'


x, x': nat
x != x' → S x != S x'

  apply (negf (invmaponpathsS x x')).
Defined.

x: nat
IHx: ∏ x' : nat, decidable (x = x')
x': nat
IHx': decidable (S x = x')

decidable (S x = S x')
 apply (ii2 (noeqinjS  _ _ e)).
Defined.

isaset nat


isaset nat

Definition natset : hSet := make_hSet _ isasetnat.

m: nat

 exact (N m).
Defined.

Definition nateq (x y : nat) : hProp := make_hProp (x = y) (isasetnat _ _).

Definition isdecrelnateq : isdecrel nateq := λ a b, isdeceqnat a b.

Definition natdeceq : decrel nat := make_decrel isdecrelnateq.

Definition natdecneq : decrel nat := make_decrel isdecrel_natneq.

Definition natboolneq : brel nat := decreltobrel natdecneq.


(** *** [ S : nat -> nat ] is a decidable inclusion. *)


isincl S


isincl S

  apply (isinclbetweensets S isasetnat isasetnat invmaponpathsS).
Defined.


isdecincl S


isdecincl S

  
n: nat
isdecprop (hfiber S n)
 
n: nat
isaprop (hfiber S n)
n: nat
hfiber S n ⨿ ¬ hfiber S n

  
n: nat
isaprop (hfiber S n)
 apply (isinclS n).
  
n: nat
hfiber S n ⨿ ¬ hfiber S n
 
hfiber S 0 ⨿ ¬ hfiber S 0
n: nat
hfiber S (S n) ⨿ ¬ hfiber S (S n)

    
hfiber S 0 ⨿ ¬ hfiber S 0
 
¬ hfiber S 0
nh: ¬ hfiber S 0
hfiber S 0 ⨿ ¬ hfiber S 0

      
¬ hfiber S 0
 
hf: hfiber S 0
∅
 
m: nat
e: S m = 0
∅
 apply (negpathssx0 _ e).
      
nh: ¬ hfiber S 0
hfiber S 0 ⨿ ¬ hfiber S 0
 apply (ii2 nh).
    
n: nat
hfiber S (S n) ⨿ ¬ hfiber S (S n)
 apply (ii1 (make_hfiber _ n (idpath _))).
Defined.


(** ** Inequalities on [nat]. *)


(** *** Boolean "less or equal" and "greater or equal" on [nat]. *)

Fixpoint natgtb (n m : nat) : bool :=
  match n, m with
  | S n, S m => natgtb n m
  | O, _ => false
  | _, _ => true
  end.


(** *** Semi-boolean "greater" on [nat] or [natgth]

1. Note that due to its definition [natgth] automatically has the property that
   [natgth n m <-> natgth (S n) (S m)] and the same applies to all other
   inequalities defined in this section.
2. We choose "greater" as the root relation from which we define all other
   relations on [nat] because it is more natural to extend "greater" to integers
   and then to rationals than it is to extend "less". *)


Definition natgth (n m : nat) : hProp := make_hProp (natgtb n m = true) (isasetbool _ _).

Notation " x > y " := (natgth x y) : nat_scope.


n: nat
¬ (0 > n)


n: nat
¬ (0 > n)

  
n: nat
false != true
 
n: nat
np: false = true
∅
 apply (nopathsfalsetotrue np).
Defined.

S n > n

S (S n) > S n

  
1 > 0

n: nat
IHn: S n > n
S (S n) > S n
 apply IHn.
Defined.

S n > 0

S n > 0

  
n: nat
true = true
 apply idpath.
Defined.

0 = 0

S n = 0
 induction (ng (natgthsn0 _)).
Defined.

S n > 0
 apply natgthsn0.
      
n: nat

m, k: nat
S n > S m → S m > S k → S n > S k
 apply (IHn m k).
Defined.

¬ (S n > S m) → ¬ (S m > S n) → S n = S m
 
n: nat

m: nat
ng1: ¬ (S n > S m)
ng2: ¬ (S m > S n)
S n = S m
 apply (maponpaths S (IHn m ng1 ng2)).
Defined.

(** *** Semi-boolean "less" on [nat] or [natlth] *)

Definition natlth (n m : nat) := m > n.

Notation " x < y " := (natlth x y) : nat_scope.

Definition negnatlthn0 (n : nat) : ¬ (n < 0) := negnatgth0n n.

Definition natlthnsn (n : nat) : n < S n := natgthsnn n.

Definition negnat0lthtois0 (n : nat) (nl : ¬ (0 < n)) : n = 0 := negnatgth0tois0 n nl.

Definition natneq0to0lth (n : nat) : n ≠ 0 -> 0 < n := natneq0togth0 n.

Definition natlth1tois0 (n : nat) : n < 1 -> n = 0 := nat1gthtois0 _.

Definition istransnatlth (n m k : nat) : n < m -> m < k -> n < k :=
  λ lnm lmk, istransnatgth _ _ _ lmk lnm.

Definition isirreflnatlth (n : nat) : ¬ (natlth n n) := isirreflnatgth n.

Notation negnatgthnn := isirreflnatlth.


n, m: nat
g: n < m
n ≠ m


n, m: nat
g: n < m
n ≠ m

  
n, m: nat
g: n < m
n ≠ m
 
n, m: nat
g: n < m
n != m
 
n, m: nat
g: n < m
e: n = m
∅
 
n, m: nat
g: m < m
e: n = m
∅

  apply (isirreflnatlth _ g).
Defined.

Definition isasymmnatlth (n m : nat) : natlth n m -> natlth m n -> empty :=
  λ lnm lmn, isasymmnatgth _ _ lmn lnm.

Definition isantisymmnegnattth  (n m : nat) :
  ¬ (natlth n m) -> ¬ (natlth m n) -> n = m := λ nlnm nlmn, isantisymmnegnatgth _ _ nlmn nlnm.

Definition isdecrelnatlth : isdecrel natlth := λ n m, isdecrelnatgth m n.

Definition natlthdec := make_decrel isdecrelnatlth.

Definition isnegrelnatlth : isnegrel natlth := λ n m, isnegrelnatgth m n.


n, m: nat
¬ (n < m) → (m < n) ⨿ (n = m)


n, m: nat
¬ (n < m) → (m < n) ⨿ (n = m)

nlnm: ¬ (n < m)
(m < n) ⨿ (n = m)

nlnm: ¬ (n < m)
l: n > m
(m < n) ⨿ (n = m)

nlnm: ¬ (n < m)
e: m = n
(m < n) ⨿ (n = m)

  
n, m: nat
nlnm: ¬ (n < m)
l: n > m
(m < n) ⨿ (n = m)
 apply (ii1 l).
  
n, m: nat
nlnm: ¬ (n < m)
e: m = n
(m < n) ⨿ (n = m)
 apply (ii2 (pathsinv0 e)).
Defined.


n, m, k: nat
n < k → (n < m) ⨿ (m < k)

n < k → (n < m) ⨿ (m < k)

  
n, m, k: nat
lnk: n < k
(n < m) ⨿ (m < k)
 
n, m, k: nat
lnk: n < k
k > n
 assumption.
Defined.


(** *** Semi-boolean "less or equal " on [nat] or [natleh] *)

Definition natleh (n m : nat) := S m > n.

Notation " x <= y " := (natleh x y) : nat_scope.

Setting y constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"_ ≤ _".


Definition isdecrelnatleh : isdecrel natleh := λ m n, isdecrelnatgth _ _.

Definition negnatlehsn0 (n : nat) : ¬ (S n ≤ 0) := negnatlthn0 n.

(* these two lemmas show agreement with the old definition: *)


n, m: nat
n ≤ m → ¬ (n > m)

¬ (0 > m)
 exact (negnatgth0n m).

S n ≤ 0 → ¬ (S n > 0)

r: S n ≤ 0
∅
 exact (negnatlehsn0 n r).
    
n: nat
N: ∏ m : nat, n ≤ m → ¬ (n > m)
m: nat
S n ≤ S m → ¬ (S n > S m)
 exact (N m).
Defined.

Defined.

Defined.

Definition neggth_logeq_leh (n m : nat) : ¬ (n > m) <-> n ≤ m := (negnatgthtoleh,,natlehneggth).

Definition natleh0tois0 {n : nat} (l : n ≤ 0) : n = 0 := natlth1tois0 n l.

Definition natleh0n (n : nat) : 0 ≤ n := natgthsn0 _.

Definition negnatlehsnn (n : nat) : ¬ (S n ≤ n) := isirreflnatlth _.

¬ (n > k)

 contradicts b t.
  
n, m, k: nat

c: ¬ (m > k)

t: m > k
∅
 contradicts c t.
Defined.

istotal natleh


istotal natleh

  
x, y: nat
x ≤ y ∨ y ≤ x
 
x, y: nat
lxy: x ≤ y
x ≤ y ∨ y ≤ x
x, y: nat
lyx: ¬ (x ≤ y)
x ≤ y ∨ y ≤ x

  
x, y: nat
lxy: x ≤ y
x ≤ y ∨ y ≤ x
 apply (hinhpr (ii1 lxy)).
  
x, y: nat
lyx: ¬ (x ≤ y)
x ≤ y ∨ y ≤ x
 
x, y: nat
lyx: ¬ (x ≤ y)
(x ≤ y) ⨿ (y ≤ x)
 
x, y: nat
lyx: ¬ (x ≤ y)
y ≤ x
 apply (iscoasymmnatleh _ _ lyx).
Defined.


(** *** Semi-boolean "greater or equal" on [nat] or [natgeh]. *)

Definition natgeh (n m : nat) : hProp := m ≤ n.

Notation " x >= y " := (natgeh x y) : nat_scope.
Notation " x ≥ y " := (natgeh x y) (at level 70, no associativity) : nat_scope.

Definition nat0gehtois0 (n : nat) (g : 0 ≥ n) : n = 0 := natleh0tois0 g.

Definition natgehn0 (n : nat) : n ≥ 0 := natleh0n n.

Definition negnatgeh0sn (n : nat) : ¬ (0 ≥ (S n)) := negnatlehsn0 n.

Definition negnatgehnsn (n : nat) : ¬ (n ≥ (S n)) := negnatlehsnn n.

Definition istransnatgeh (n m k : nat) : n ≥ m -> m ≥ k -> n ≥ k := λ gnm gmk, istransnatleh gmk gnm.

Definition isreflnatgeh (n : nat) : n ≥ n := isreflnatleh _.

Definition isantisymmnatgeh (n m : nat) : n ≥ m -> m ≥ n -> n = m :=
  λ gnm gmn, isantisymmnatleh _ _ gmn gnm.

Definition isdecrelnatgeh : isdecrel natgeh := λ n m, isdecrelnatleh m n.

Definition natgehdec : decrel nat := make_decrel isdecrelnatgeh.

Definition isnegrelnatgeh : isnegrel natgeh := λ n m, isnegrelnatleh m n.

Definition iscoasymmnatgeh (n m : nat) (nl : ¬ (n ≥ m)) : m ≥ n := iscoasymmnatleh _ _ nl.

Definition istotalnatgeh : istotal natgeh := λ n m, istotalnatleh m n.

(** *** Simple implications between comparisons *)


n, m: nat
n > m → n ≥ m


n, m: nat
n > m → n ≥ m

  apply natlthtoleh.
Defined.


n, m: nat
n ≤ m → ¬ (n > m)


n, m: nat
n ≤ m → ¬ (n > m)

  
n, m: nat
r: n ≤ m
¬ (n > m)
 
n, m: nat
r: n ≤ m
n ≤ m
 assumption.
Defined.

Definition  natgthtonegnatleh (n m : nat) : n > m -> ¬ (n ≤ m) := λ g l, natlehtonegnatgth _ _ l g.

Definition natgehtonegnatlth (n m : nat) :  n ≥ m -> ¬ (n < m) :=
  λ gnm lnm, natlehtonegnatgth _ _ gnm lnm.

Definition natlthtonegnatgeh (n m : nat) : n < m -> ¬ (n ≥ m) :=
  λ gnm lnm, natlehtonegnatgth _ _ lnm gnm.


n, m: nat
¬ (n ≥ m) → n < m


n, m: nat
¬ (n ≥ m) → n < m

  
n, m: nat
r: ¬ (n ≥ m)
n < m
 
n, m: nat
r: ¬ (n ≥ m)
¬ (m ≤ n)
 assumption.
Defined.

Definition negnatlthtogeh (n m : nat) : ¬ (n < m) -> n ≥ m := λ nl, negnatgthtoleh nl.

(* *** Simple corollaries of implications *** *)

Definition natlehnsn (n : nat) : n ≤ S n := natlthtoleh _ _ (natgthsnn n).

Definition natgehsnn (n : nat) : (S n) ≥ n := natlehnsn n.


(** *** Comparison alternatives *)


n, m: nat
(n > m) ⨿ (n ≤ m)


n, m: nat
(n > m) ⨿ (n ≤ m)

  
n, m: nat
(n > m) ⨿ (n ≤ m)

  
n, m: nat
a: n > m
(n > m) ⨿ (n ≤ m)
n, m: nat
a: ¬ (n > m)
(n > m) ⨿ (n ≤ m)

  
n, m: nat
a: n > m
(n > m) ⨿ (n ≤ m)
 
n, m: nat
a: n > m
n > m
 assumption.
  
n, m: nat
a: ¬ (n > m)
(n > m) ⨿ (n ≤ m)
 
n, m: nat
a: ¬ (n > m)
n ≤ m
 
n, m: nat
a: ¬ (n > m)
¬ (n > m)
 assumption.
Defined.

Definition natlthorgeh (n m : nat) : (n < m) ⨿ (n ≥ m) := natgthorleh _ _.


n: nat
(0 = n) ⨿ (0 < n)


n: nat
(0 = n) ⨿ (0 < n)

  
(0 = 0) ⨿ (0 < 0)
n: nat
IHn: (0 = n) ⨿ (0 < n)
(0 = S n) ⨿ (0 < S n)

  
(0 = 0) ⨿ (0 < 0)
 
0 = 0
 apply idpath.
  
n: nat
IHn: (0 = n) ⨿ (0 < n)
(0 = S n) ⨿ (0 < S n)
 
n: nat
IHn: (0 = n) ⨿ (0 < n)
0 < S n
 apply natgthsn0.
Qed.


n, m: nat
ne: n ≠ m
(n > m) ⨿ (n < m)


n, m: nat
ne: n ≠ m
(n > m) ⨿ (n < m)

  
n, m: nat
ne: n ≠ m
(n > m) ⨿ (n < m)
 
n, m: nat
ne: n ≠ m
l: n > m
(n > m) ⨿ (n < m)
n, m: nat
ne: n ≠ m
g: n ≤ m
(n > m) ⨿ (n < m)

  
n, m: nat
ne: n ≠ m
l: n > m
(n > m) ⨿ (n < m)
 exact (ii1 l).
  
n, m: nat
ne: n ≠ m
g: n ≤ m
(n > m) ⨿ (n < m)
 
n, m: nat
ne: n ≠ m
g: n ≤ m
l': n < m
(n > m) ⨿ (n < m)
n, m: nat
ne: n ≠ m
g: n ≤ m
g': n ≥ m
(n > m) ⨿ (n < m)

    
n, m: nat
ne: n ≠ m
g: n ≤ m
l': n < m
(n > m) ⨿ (n < m)
 apply (ii2 l').
    
n, m: nat
ne: n ≠ m
g: n ≤ m
g': n ≥ m
(n > m) ⨿ (n < m)
 contradicts (nat_neq_to_nopath ne) (isantisymmnatleh _ _ g g').
Defined.


n, m: nat
l: n ≤ m
(n < m) ⨿ (n = m)


n, m: nat
l: n ≤ m
(n < m) ⨿ (n = m)

  
n, m: nat
l: n ≤ m
(n < m) ⨿ (n = m)
 
n, m: nat
l: n ≤ m
l': n < m
(n < m) ⨿ (n = m)
n, m: nat
l: n ≤ m
g: n ≥ m
(n < m) ⨿ (n = m)

  
n, m: nat
l: n ≤ m
l': n < m
(n < m) ⨿ (n = m)
 apply (ii1 l').
  
n, m: nat
l: n ≤ m
g: n ≥ m
(n < m) ⨿ (n = m)
 apply (ii2 (isantisymmnatleh _ _ l g)).
Defined.


n, m: nat
g: n ≥ m
(n > m) ⨿ (n = m)


n, m: nat
g: n ≥ m
(n > m) ⨿ (n = m)

  
n, m: nat
g: n ≥ m
(n > m) ⨿ (n = m)
 
n, m: nat
g: n ≥ m
g': n > m
(n > m) ⨿ (n = m)
n, m: nat
g: n ≥ m
l: n ≤ m
(n > m) ⨿ (n = m)

  
n, m: nat
g: n ≥ m
g': n > m
(n > m) ⨿ (n = m)
 apply (ii1 g').
  
n, m: nat
g: n ≥ m
l: n ≤ m
(n > m) ⨿ (n = m)
 apply (ii2 (isantisymmnatleh _ _ l g)).
Defined.


(** *** Mixed transitivities *)


n, m, k: nat
n > m → m ≥ k → n > k


n, m, k: nat
n > m → m ≥ k → n > k

  
n, m, k: nat
gnm: n > m
gmk: m ≥ k
n > k
 
n, m, k: nat
gnm: n > m
gmk: m ≥ k
g': m > k
n > k
n, m, k: nat
gnm: n > m
gmk: m ≥ k
e: m = k
n > k

  
n, m, k: nat
gnm: n > m
gmk: m ≥ k
g': m > k
n > k
 apply (istransnatgth _ _ _ gnm g').
  
n, m, k: nat
gnm: n > m
gmk: m ≥ k
e: m = k
n > k
 
n, m, k: nat
gnm: n > k
gmk: m ≥ k
e: m = k
n > k
 apply gnm.
Defined.


n, m, k: nat
n ≥ m → m > k → n > k


n, m, k: nat
n ≥ m → m > k → n > k

  
n, m, k: nat
gnm: n ≥ m
gmk: m > k
n > k
 
n, m, k: nat
gnm: n ≥ m
gmk: m > k
g': n > m
n > k
n, m, k: nat
gnm: n ≥ m
gmk: m > k
e: n = m
n > k

  
n, m, k: nat
gnm: n ≥ m
gmk: m > k
g': n > m
n > k
 apply (istransnatgth _ _ _ g' gmk).
  
n, m, k: nat
gnm: n ≥ m
gmk: m > k
e: n = m
n > k
 
n, m, k: nat
gnm: n ≥ m
gmk: m > k
e: n = m
m > k
 apply gmk.
Defined.


n, m, k: nat
n < m → m ≤ k → n < k


n, m, k: nat
n < m → m ≤ k → n < k

  
n, m, k: nat
l1: n < m
l2: m ≤ k
n < k
 apply (natgehgthtrans k m n l2 l1).
Defined.


n, m, k: nat
n ≤ m → m < k → n < k


n, m, k: nat
n ≤ m → m < k → n < k

  
n, m, k: nat
l1: n ≤ m
l2: m < k
n < k
 apply (natgthgehtrans k m n l2 l1).
Defined.


i, j, n: nat
i < j → j < S n → i < n


i, j, n: nat
i < j → j < S n → i < n

  
i, j, n: nat
l: i < j
j < S n → i < n
 
i, j, n: nat
l: i < j
i < j
 assumption.
Defined.


(** *** Two comparisons and [S] *)


n, m: nat
n > m → n ≥ S m


n, m: nat
n > m → n ≥ S m

  
n: nat
∏ m : nat, n > m → n ≥ S m
 
∏ m : nat, 0 > m → 0 ≥ S m
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n > m → n ≥ S m
∏ m : nat, S n > m → S n ≥ S m

  
∏ m : nat, 0 > m → 0 ≥ S m
 
m: nat
X: 0 > m
0 ≥ S m
 induction (negnatgth0n _ X).
  
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n > m → n ≥ S m
∏ m : nat, S n > m → S n ≥ S m
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n > m → n ≥ S m
m: nat
X: S n > m
S n ≥ S m
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n > m → n ≥ S m
X: S n > 0
S n ≥ 1
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n > m → n ≥ S m
m: nat
X: S n > S m
S n ≥ S (S m)

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n > m → n ≥ S m
X: S n > 0
S n ≥ 1
 apply (natgehn0 n).
    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n > m → n ≥ S m
m: nat
X: S n > S m
S n ≥ S (S m)
 apply (IHn m X).
Defined.


n, m: nat
S n > m → n ≥ m


n, m: nat
S n > m → n ≥ m

  
n, m: nat
a: S n > m
n ≥ m
 apply (natgthtogehsn (S n) m a).
Defined. (* PeWa *)


n, m: nat
n ≥ m → S n > m


n, m: nat
n ≥ m → S n > m

  
n, m: nat
X: n ≥ m
S n > m
 
n, m: nat
X: n ≥ m
S n > n
n, m: nat
X: n ≥ m
n ≥ m

  
n, m: nat
X: n ≥ m
S n > n
 apply natgthsnn.
  
n, m: nat
X: n ≥ m
n ≥ m
 apply X.
Defined.  (* New *)


n, m: nat
n ≥ S m → n > m


n, m: nat
n ≥ S m → n > m

  
n, m: nat
X: n ≥ S m
n > m

  
n, m: nat
X: n ≥ S m
S m > m

  apply natgthsnn.
Defined.  (* New *)


n, m: nat
n < m → S n ≤ m


n, m: nat
n < m → S n ≤ m

  
n, m: nat
X: n < m
S n ≤ m
 apply (natgthtogehsn m n X).
Defined.


n, m: nat
S n ≤ m → n < m


n, m: nat
S n ≤ m → n < m

  
n, m: nat
X: S n ≤ m
n < m
 apply (natgehsntogth m n X).
Defined.


n, m: nat
n ≤ m → n < S m


n, m: nat
n ≤ m → n < S m

  
n, m: nat
X: n ≤ m
n < S m
 apply (natgehtogthsn m n X).
Defined.


n, m: nat
n < S m → n ≤ m


n, m: nat
n < S m → n ≤ m

  
n, m: nat
a: n < S m
n ≤ m
 apply (natlthtolehsn n (S m) a).
Defined. (* PeWa *)


(** *** Comparision alternatives and [S] *)


n, m: nat
n ≤ m → (S n ≤ m) ⨿ (n = m)


n, m: nat
n ≤ m → (S n ≤ m) ⨿ (n = m)

  
n, m: nat
l: n ≤ m
(S n ≤ m) ⨿ (n = m)
 
n, m: nat
l: n ≤ m
l': n < m
(S n ≤ m) ⨿ (n = m)
n, m: nat
l: n ≤ m
e: n = m
(S n ≤ m) ⨿ (n = m)

  
n, m: nat
l: n ≤ m
l': n < m
(S n ≤ m) ⨿ (n = m)
 apply (ii1 (natlthtolehsn _ _ l')).
  
n, m: nat
l: n ≤ m
e: n = m
(S n ≤ m) ⨿ (n = m)
 apply (ii2 e).
Defined.


n, m: nat
n ≥ m → (n ≥ S m) ⨿ (n = m)


n, m: nat
n ≥ m → (n ≥ S m) ⨿ (n = m)

  
n, m: nat
g: n ≥ m
(n ≥ S m) ⨿ (n = m)
 
n, m: nat
g: n ≥ m
g': n > m
(n ≥ S m) ⨿ (n = m)
n, m: nat
g: n ≥ m
e: n = m
(n ≥ S m) ⨿ (n = m)

  
n, m: nat
g: n ≥ m
g': n > m
(n ≥ S m) ⨿ (n = m)
 apply (ii1 (natgthtogehsn _ _ g')).
  
n, m: nat
g: n ≥ m
e: n = m
(n ≥ S m) ⨿ (n = m)
 apply (ii2 e).
Defined.


n, m: nat
n > m → (n > S m) ⨿ (n = S m)


n, m: nat
n > m → (n > S m) ⨿ (n = S m)

  
n, m: nat
g: n > m
(n > S m) ⨿ (n = S m)

  
n, m: nat
g: n > m
g': n > S m
(n > S m) ⨿ (n = S m)
n, m: nat
g: n > m
e: n = S m
(n > S m) ⨿ (n = S m)

  
n, m: nat
g: n > m
g': n > S m
(n > S m) ⨿ (n = S m)
 apply (ii1 g').
  
n, m: nat
g: n > m
e: n = S m
(n > S m) ⨿ (n = S m)
 apply (ii2 e).
Defined.


n, m: nat
n < m → (S n < m) ⨿ (S n = m)


n, m: nat
n < m → (S n < m) ⨿ (S n = m)

  
n, m: nat
l: n < m
(S n < m) ⨿ (S n = m)

  
n, m: nat
l: n < m
l': S n < m
(S n < m) ⨿ (S n = m)
n, m: nat
l: n < m
e: S n = m
(S n < m) ⨿ (S n = m)

  
n, m: nat
l: n < m
l': S n < m
(S n < m) ⨿ (S n = m)
 apply (ii1 l').
  
n, m: nat
l: n < m
e: S n = m
(S n < m) ⨿ (S n = m)
 apply (ii2 e).
Defined.


(** ** Some properties of [plus] on [nat] *)

(* Addition is defined in Init/Peano.v by the following code

Fixpoint plus (n m:nat) : nat :=
  match n with
  | O => m
  | S p => S (p + m)
  end

where "n + m" := (plus n m) : nat_scope.
*)


(** *** The structure of the additive abelian monoid on [nat] *)


n: nat
0 + n = n


n: nat
0 + n = n

  
n: nat
0 + n = n
 apply idpath.
Defined.


n: nat
n + 0 = n


n: nat
n + 0 = n

  
0 + 0 = 0
n: nat
IH: n + 0 = n
S n + 0 = S n

  
0 + 0 = 0
 apply idpath.
  
n: nat
IH: n + 0 = n
S n + 0 = S n
 
n: nat
IH: n + 0 = n
S (n + 0) = S n
 apply (maponpaths S IH).
Defined.
#[global]
Hint Resolve natplusr0: natarith.


n, m: nat
n + S m = S n + m


n, m: nat
n + S m = S n + m

  
n: nat
∏ m : nat, n + S m = S n + m

  
n: nat
∏ m : nat, n + S m = S (n + m)
 
∏ m : nat, 0 + S m = S (0 + m)
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n + S m = S (n + m)
∏ m : nat, S n + S m = S (S n + m)

  
∏ m : nat, 0 + S m = S (0 + m)
 auto with natarith.
  
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n + S m = S (n + m)
∏ m : nat, S n + S m = S (S n + m)
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n + S m = S (n + m)
∏ m : nat, S (n + S m) = S (S (n + m))
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n + S m = S (n + m)
m: nat
S (n + S m) = S (S (n + m))
 apply (maponpaths S (IHn m)).
Defined.
#[global]
Hint Resolve natplusnsm : natarith.
#[global]
Hint Resolve pathsinv0 : natarith.


n, m: nat
n + m = m + n


n, m: nat
n + m = m + n

  
n: nat
∏ m : nat, n + m = m + n
 
∏ m : nat, 0 + m = m + 0
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n + m = m + n
∏ m : nat, S n + m = m + S n

  
∏ m : nat, 0 + m = m + 0
 
m: nat
0 + m = m + 0

    (*apply pathsinv0.*)
    (*apply natplusr0.*)
    auto with natarith.
  
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n + m = m + n
∏ m : nat, S n + m = m + S n
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n + m = m + n
m: nat
S n + m = m + S n
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n + m = m + n
m: nat
int:= IHn (S m): n + S m = S m + n
S n + m = m + S n

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n + m = m + n
m: nat
int:= IHn (S m): n + S m = S m + n
int2:= ! natplusnsm n m: S n + m = n + S m
S n + m = m + S n

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n + m = m + n
m: nat
int:= IHn (S m): n + S m = S m + n
int2:= ! natplusnsm n m: S n + m = n + S m
int3:= ! natplusnsm m n: S m + n = m + S n
S n + m = m + S n

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n + m = m + n
m: nat
int:= IHn (S m): n + S m = S m + n
int2:= ! natplusnsm n m: S n + m = n + S m
int3:= ! natplusnsm m n: S m + n = m + S n
int4:= int2 @ int: S n + m = S m + n
S n + m = m + S n

    apply (pathscomp0 int4 int3).
Defined.
#[global]
Hint Resolve natpluscomm : natarith.


n, m, k: nat
n + m + k = n + (m + k)


n, m, k: nat
n + m + k = n + (m + k)

  
n: nat
∏ m k : nat, n + m + k = n + (m + k)
 
∏ m k : nat, 0 + m + k = 0 + (m + k)
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m k : nat, n + m + k = n + (m + k)
∏ m k : nat, S n + m + k = S n + (m + k)

  
∏ m k : nat, 0 + m + k = 0 + (m + k)
 auto with natarith.
  
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m k : nat, n + m + k = n + (m + k)
∏ m k : nat, S n + m + k = S n + (m + k)
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m k : nat, n + m + k = n + (m + k)
m, k: nat
S n + m + k = S n + (m + k)
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m k : nat, n + m + k = n + (m + k)
m, k: nat
S (n + m + k) = S (n + (m + k))
 apply (maponpaths S (IHn m k)).
Defined.
#[global]
Hint Resolve natplusassoc : natarith.


(** *** Addition and comparisons  *)

(** [natgth] *)


n, m: nat
n > m → S n > m


n, m: nat
n > m → S n > m

  
n, m: nat
is: n > m
S n > m
 apply (istransnatgth _ _ _ (natgthsnn n) is).
Defined.


n, m: nat
¬ (m > n + m)


n, m: nat
¬ (m > n + m)

  
n, m: nat
¬ (m > n + m)
 
m: nat
¬ (m > 0 + m)
n, m: nat
IHn: ¬ (m > n + m)
¬ (m > S n + m)

  
m: nat
¬ (m > 0 + m)
 apply isirreflnatgth.
  
n, m: nat
IHn: ¬ (m > n + m)
¬ (m > S n + m)
 
n, m: nat
IHn: ¬ (m > n + m)
m ≤ S n + m

    
n, m: nat
r: m ≤ n + m
m ≤ S n + m

    apply (istransnatleh r (natlthtoleh _ _ (natlthnsn _))).
Defined.


n, m: nat
¬ (n > n + m)


n, m: nat
¬ (n > n + m)

  
n, m: nat
¬ (n > n + m)
 
n, m: nat
¬ (n > m + n)
 apply (negnatgthmplusnm m n).
Defined.


n, m, k: nat
n > m → k + n > k + m


n, m, k: nat
n > m → k + n > k + m

  
n, m, k: nat
l: n > m
k + n > k + m
 
n, m: nat
l: n > m
0 + n > 0 + m
n, m, k: nat
l: n > m
IHk: k + n > k + m
S k + n > S k + m

  
n, m: nat
l: n > m
0 + n > 0 + m
 assumption.
  
n, m, k: nat
l: n > m
IHk: k + n > k + m
S k + n > S k + m
 assumption.
Defined.


n, m, k: nat
n > m → n + k > m + k


n, m, k: nat
n > m → n + k > m + k

  
n, m, k: nat
X: n > m
n + k > m + k

  
n, m, k: nat
X: n > m
k + n > m + k
 
n, m, k: nat
X: n > m
k + n > k + m

  
n, m, k: nat
X: n > m
n > m

  assumption.
Defined.


n, m, k: nat
k + n > k + m → n > m


n, m, k: nat
k + n > k + m → n > m

  
n, m, k: nat
l: k + n > k + m
n > m
 
n, m: nat
l: 0 + n > 0 + m
n > m

IHk: k + n > k + m → n > m
n > m

l: 0 + n > 0 + m
n > m
 assumption.
  
n, m, k: nat
l: S k + n > S k + m
IHk: k + n > k + m → n > m
n > m
 apply (IHk l).
Defined.

n + S m > n + 1

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, m > 0 → n + m > n
m: nat
H: m > 0
S m > 1
 apply H.
Qed.

(** [natlth] *)

Definition natlthtolths (n m : nat) : n < m -> n < S m := natgthtogths _ _.

Definition negnatlthplusnmm (n m : nat) : ¬ (n + m < m) := negnatgthmplusnm _ _.

Definition negnatlthplusnmn (n m : nat) : ¬ (n + m < n) := negnatgthnplusnm _ _.

Definition natlthandplusl (n m k : nat) : n < m -> k + n < k + m := natgthandplusl _ _ _.

Definition natlthandplusr (n m k : nat) : n < m -> n + k < m + k := natgthandplusr _ _ _.

Definition natlthandpluslinv  (n m k : nat) : k + n < k + m -> n < m := natgthandpluslinv _ _ _.

Definition natlthandplusrinv (n m k : nat) : n + k < m + k -> n < m := natgthandplusrinv _ _ _.

Definition natlthandplusm (n m : nat) (H : 0 < m) : n < n + m := natgthandplusm _ _ H.

(** [natleh] *)


n, m: nat
n ≤ m → n ≤ S m


n, m: nat
n ≤ m → n ≤ S m

  
n, m: nat
is: n ≤ m
n ≤ S m

  apply (istransnatleh is (natlthtoleh _ _ (natlthnsn _))).
Defined.


n, m: nat
m ≤ n + m


n, m: nat
m ≤ n + m

  
n, m: nat
m ≤ n + m
 
m: nat
m ≤ 0 + m
n, m: nat
N: m ≤ n + m
m ≤ S n + m

  
m: nat
m ≤ 0 + m
 
m: nat
m ≤ m
 apply isreflnatleh.
  
n, m: nat
N: m ≤ n + m
m ≤ S n + m
 
n, m: nat
N: m ≤ n + m
m
≤ (fix add (n m : nat) {struct n} : nat :=
     match n with
     | 0 => m
     | S p => S (add p m)
     end) n m
 assumption.
Defined.


∏ n m : nat, S (n + m) = n + S m


∏ n m : nat, S (n + m) = n + S m

  
n, m: nat
S (n + m) = n + S m

  
m: nat
S (0 + m) = 0 + S m
n, m: nat
I: S (n + m) = n + S m
S (S n + m) = S n + S m

  
m: nat
S (0 + m) = 0 + S m
 reflexivity.
  
n, m: nat
I: S (n + m) = n + S m
S (S n + m) = S n + S m
 
n, m: nat
I: S (n + m) = n + S m
S (S (n + m)) = S (n + S m)
 
n, m: nat
I: S (n + m) = n + S m
S (n + m) = n + S m
 auto.
Qed.

(** [natgeh] *)

Definition natgehtogehs (n m : nat) : n ≥ m ->  S n ≥ m := natlehtolehs _ _.

Definition natgehplusnmm (n m : nat) : n + m ≥ m := natlehmplusnm _ _.

Definition natgehplusnmn (n m : nat) : n + m ≥ n := natlehnplusnm _ _.

Definition natgehandplusl (n m k : nat) : n ≥ m -> k + n ≥ k + m := natlehandplusl _ _ _.

Definition natgehandplusr (n m k : nat) : n ≥ m -> n + k ≥ m + k := natlehandplusr _ _ _.

Definition natgehandpluslinv  (n m k : nat) : k + n ≥ k + m -> n ≥ m := natlehandpluslinv _ _ _.

Definition natgehandplusrinv (n m k : nat) :  n + k ≥ m + k -> n ≥ m := natlehandplusrinv _ _ _.

(* The following are included mainly for direct compatibility with the library hz.v *)


(** *** Comparisons and [n -> n + 1] *)


n, m: nat
n > m → n + 1 > m


n, m: nat
n > m → n + 1 > m

  
n, m: nat
is: n > m
n + 1 > m
 
n, m: nat
is: n > m
1 + n > m

  apply (natgthtogths n m is).
Defined.

Definition natlthtolthp1 (n m : nat) : n < m -> n < m + 1 := natgthtogthp1 _ _.


n, m: nat
n ≤ m → n ≤ m + 1


n, m: nat
n ≤ m → n ≤ m + 1

  
n, m: nat
is: n ≤ m
n ≤ m + 1
 
n, m: nat
is: n ≤ m
n ≤ 1 + m

  apply (natlehtolehs n m is).
Defined.

Definition natgehtogehp1 (n m : nat) : n ≥ m -> (n + 1) ≥ m := natlehtolehp1 _ _.


(** *** Two comparisons and [n -> n + 1] *)


n, m: nat
n > m → n ≥ m + 1


n, m: nat
n > m → n ≥ m + 1

  
n, m: nat
is: n > m
n ≥ m + 1
 
n, m: nat
is: n > m
n ≥ 1 + m

  apply (natgthtogehsn n m is).
Defined.


n, m: nat
n + 1 > m → n ≥ m


n, m: nat
n + 1 > m → n ≥ m

  
n, m: nat
is: n + 1 > m
n ≥ m
 
n, m: nat
is: 1 + n > m
n ≥ m

  apply (natgthsntogeh n m is).
Defined. (* PeWa *)


n, m: nat
n + 1 ≤ m → n < m


n, m: nat
n + 1 ≤ m → n < m

  
n, m: nat
is: n + 1 ≤ m
n < m
 
n, m: nat
is: 1 + n ≤ m
n < m

  apply (natlehsntolth n m is).
Defined.


n, m: nat
n < m → n + 1 ≤ m


n, m: nat
n < m → n + 1 ≤ m

  
n, m: nat
is: n < m
n + 1 ≤ m
 
n, m: nat
is: n < m
1 + n ≤ m

  apply (natlthtolehsn n m is).
Defined.


n, m: nat
n < m + 1 → n ≤ m


n, m: nat
n < m + 1 → n ≤ m

  
n, m: nat
is: n < m + 1
n ≤ m
 
n, m: nat
is: n < 1 + m
n ≤ m

  apply (natlthsntoleh n m is).
Defined. (* PeWa *)


n, m: nat
n ≥ m + 1 → n > m


n, m: nat
n ≥ m + 1 → n > m

  
n, m: nat
is: n ≥ m + 1
n > m
 
n, m: nat
is: n ≥ 1 + m
n > m

  apply (natgehsntogth n m is).
Defined.


(** *** Comparision alternatives and [n -> n + 1] *)


n, m: nat
n ≤ m → (n + 1 ≤ m) ⨿ (n = m)


n, m: nat
n ≤ m → (n + 1 ≤ m) ⨿ (n = m)

  
n, m: nat
l: n ≤ m
(n + 1 ≤ m) ⨿ (n = m)
 
n, m: nat
l: n ≤ m
l': n < m
(n + 1 ≤ m) ⨿ (n = m)
n, m: nat
l: n ≤ m
e: n = m
(n + 1 ≤ m) ⨿ (n = m)

  
n, m: nat
l: n ≤ m
l': n < m
(n + 1 ≤ m) ⨿ (n = m)
 apply (ii1 (natlthtolehp1 _ _ l')).
  
n, m: nat
l: n ≤ m
e: n = m
(n + 1 ≤ m) ⨿ (n = m)
 apply (ii2 e).
Defined.


n, m: nat
n ≥ m → (n ≥ m + 1) ⨿ (n = m)


n, m: nat
n ≥ m → (n ≥ m + 1) ⨿ (n = m)

  
n, m: nat
g: n ≥ m
(n ≥ m + 1) ⨿ (n = m)
 
n, m: nat
g: n ≥ m
g': n > m
(n ≥ m + 1) ⨿ (n = m)
n, m: nat
g: n ≥ m
e: n = m
(n ≥ m + 1) ⨿ (n = m)

  
n, m: nat
g: n ≥ m
g': n > m
(n ≥ m + 1) ⨿ (n = m)
 apply (ii1 (natgthtogehp1 _ _ g')).
  
n, m: nat
g: n ≥ m
e: n = m
(n ≥ m + 1) ⨿ (n = m)
 apply (ii2 e).
Defined.


n, m: nat
n > m → (n > m + 1) ⨿ (n = m + 1)


n, m: nat
n > m → (n > m + 1) ⨿ (n = m + 1)

g: n > m
(n > m + 1) ⨿ (n = m + 1)

g: n > m
g': n > m + 1
(n > m + 1) ⨿ (n = m + 1)
n, m: nat
g: n > m
e: n = m + 1
(n > m + 1) ⨿ (n = m + 1)

  
n, m: nat
g: n > m
g': n > m + 1
(n > m + 1) ⨿ (n = m + 1)
 apply (ii1 g').
  
n, m: nat
g: n > m
e: n = m + 1
(n > m + 1) ⨿ (n = m + 1)
 apply (ii2 e).
Defined.


n, m: nat
n < m → (n + 1 < m) ⨿ (n + 1 = m)


n, m: nat
n < m → (n + 1 < m) ⨿ (n + 1 = m)

  
n, m: nat
l: n < m
(n + 1 < m) ⨿ (n + 1 = m)

l: n < m
l': n + 1 < m
(n + 1 < m) ⨿ (n + 1 = m)
n, m: nat
l: n < m
e: n + 1 = m
(n + 1 < m) ⨿ (n + 1 = m)

  
n, m: nat
l: n < m
l': n + 1 < m
(n + 1 < m) ⨿ (n + 1 = m)
 apply (ii1 l').
  
n, m: nat
l: n < m
e: n + 1 = m
(n + 1 < m) ⨿ (n + 1 = m)
 apply (ii2 e).
Defined.


n, m: nat
n < S m → (n < m) ⨿ (n = m)


n, m: nat
n < S m → (n < m) ⨿ (n = m)

  
n, m: nat
b: n < S m
(n < m) ⨿ (n = m)

  
n, m: nat
b: n < S m
p: n < m
(n < m) ⨿ (n = m)
n, m: nat
b: n < S m
p: n ≥ m
(n < m) ⨿ (n = m)

  
n, m: nat
b: n < S m
p: n < m
(n < m) ⨿ (n = m)
 exact (ii1 p).
  
n, m: nat
b: n < S m
p: n ≥ m
(n < m) ⨿ (n = m)
 exact (ii2 (isantisymmnatleh _ _ (natlthsntoleh _ _ b) p)).
Defined.


(** *** Cancellation properties of [plus] on [nat] *)


n, m: nat
iteration S n m = n + m


n, m: nat
iteration S n m = n + m

  
n, m: nat
iteration S n m = n + m
 
m: nat
iteration S 0 m = 0 + m
n, m: nat
IHn: iteration S n m = n + m
iteration S (S n) m = S n + m

  
m: nat
iteration S 0 m = 0 + m
 apply idpath.
  
n, m: nat
IHn: iteration S n m = n + m
iteration S (S n) m = S n + m
 
n, m: nat
IHn: iteration S n m = n + m
S (iteration S n m) = S (n + m)
 apply (maponpaths S IHn).
Defined.


n: nat
isincl (λ m : nat, m + n)


n: nat
isincl (λ m : nat, m + n)

  
isincl (λ m : nat, m + 0)
n: nat
IHn: isincl (λ m : nat, m + n)
isincl (λ m : nat, m + S n)

  
isincl (λ m : nat, m + 0)
 
isofhlevelf 1 (λ m : nat, m)

    apply (isofhlevelfweq 1 (idweq nat)).
  
n: nat
IHn: isincl (λ m : nat, m + n)
isincl (λ m : nat, m + S n)
 
n: nat
IHn: isincl (λ m : nat, m + n)
isofhlevelf 1 (λ m : nat, S m + n)

    
n: nat
IHn: isincl (λ m : nat, m + n)
isofhlevelf 1 (λ m : nat, S (m + n))
 apply (isofhlevelfgf 1 _ _ isinclS IHn).
Defined.


n: nat
isincl (λ m : nat, n + m)


n: nat
isincl (λ m : nat, n + m)

  apply (isofhlevelfhomot 1 _ _ (λ m : nat, natpluscomm m n) (isinclnatplusr n)).
Defined.


a, b, c: nat
is: a + c = b + c
a = b


a, b, c: nat
is: a + c = b + c
a = b

  
a, b, c: nat
is: a + c = b + c
a = b
 
a, b, c: nat
is: a + c = b + c
a + c = b + c
 apply is.
Defined.


a, b, c: nat
is: c + a = c + b
a = b


a, b, c: nat
is: c + a = c + b
a = b

  
a, b, c: nat
is: c + a = c + b
a = b
 
a, b, c: nat
is: a + c = c + b
a = b

  
a, b, c: nat
is: a + c = b + c
a = b

  apply (natplusrcan a b c  is).
Defined.

is: 0 ≥ n

is: S m ≥ n
IHm: m ≥ n → hfiber (λ i : nat, i + n) m
hfiber (λ i : nat, i + n) (S m)

hfiber (λ i : nat, i + n) 0
 
n: nat
is: 0 ≥ n
e:= natleh0tois0 is: n = 0
hfiber (λ i : nat, i + n) 0
 
n: nat
is: 0 ≥ n
e:= natleh0tois0 is: n = 0
0 + n = 0
 apply e.

is: S m ≥ n
IHm: m ≥ n → hfiber (λ i : nat, i + n) m
hfiber (λ i : nat, i + n) (S m)

l: S n ≤ S m

IHm: m ≥ n → hfiber (λ i : nat, i + n) m
e: n = S m

j:= IHm l: hfiber (λ i : nat, i + n) m

l: S n ≤ S m
j: nat
e': j + n = m
S j + n = S m
 
n, m: nat
is: S m ≥ n
IHm: m ≥ n → hfiber (λ i : nat, i + n) m
l: S n ≤ S m
j: nat
e': j + n = m
S (j + n) = S m

        apply (maponpaths S e').
      
n, m: nat
is: S m ≥ n
IHm: m ≥ n → hfiber (λ i : nat, i + n) m
e: n = S m
hfiber (λ i : nat, i + n) (S m)
 
n, m: nat
is: S m ≥ n
IHm: m ≥ n → hfiber (λ i : nat, i + n) m
e: n = S m
0 + n = S m
 
n, m: nat
is: S m ≥ n
IHm: m ≥ n → hfiber (λ i : nat, i + n) m
e: n = S m
n = S m
 assumption.
Defined.

n = 0

e: n = S m

n, m: nat
is: S m ≥ n
IHm: m ≥ n → hfiber (λ i : nat, n + i) m
l: S n ≤ S m
hfiber (λ i : nat, n + i) (S m)

IHm: m ≥ n → hfiber (λ i : nat, n + i) m
l: S n ≤ S m
j:= IHm l: hfiber (λ i : nat, n + i) m
hfiber (λ i : nat, n + i) (S m)

l: S n ≤ S m
j: nat
e': n + j = m

S (n + j) = S m
 apply (maponpaths S e').

e: n = S m

n = S m
 assumption.
Defined.

n, m: nat
hfiber (λ i : nat, i + n) m

n, m: nat

n, m: nat
i: m ≥ n
hfiber (λ i : nat, i + n) m
⨿ ¬ hfiber (λ i : nat, i + n) m

    
n, m: nat
ni: m < n
hfiber (λ i : nat, i + n) m
⨿ ¬ hfiber (λ i : nat, i + n) m
 apply (ii2 (neghfibernatplusr n m ni)).
    
n, m: nat
i: m ≥ n
hfiber (λ i : nat, i + n) m
⨿ ¬ hfiber (λ i : nat, i + n) m
 apply (ii1 (pr1 (iscontrhfibernatplusr n m i))).
Defined.


(** *** Some properties of [minus] on [nat]

Note : minus is defined in Init/Peano.v by the following code:

Fixpoint minus (n m : nat) : nat :=
  match n, m with
  | O, _ => n
  | S k, O => n
  | S k, S l => k - l
  end

where "n - m" := (minus n m) : nat_scope.
*)

n - m = 0

| S (S m0) => natgtb n m0
| _ => true
end = true
 apply (istransnatleh (IHn m) (natlehnsn n)).
Defined.

Definition natminusgehn (n m : nat) : n ≥ n - m := natminuslehn _ _.

| 0 => true

| 0 => true
| S m => natgtb n m

is: match m with
| 0 => true
| S m => natgtb n m
end = true

int1:= natgehplusnmm n m: n + m ≥ m

int1:= natgehplusnmm n m: n + m ≥ m
n + m - m + m = n + m

int1:= natgehplusnmm n m: n + m ≥ m
n + m = n + m

  apply idpath.
Defined.


n, m: nat
H: m ≥ n
m - (m - n) = n


n, m: nat
H: m ≥ n
m - (m - n) = n

  
n, m: nat
H: m ≥ n
m - (m - n) + (m - n) = n + (m - n)

  
n, m: nat
H: m ≥ n
m - (m - n) + (m - n) = n + (m - n)
 
n, m: nat
H: m ≥ n
m = n + (m - n)
n, m: nat
H: m ≥ n
m ≥ m - n

    
n, m: nat
H: m ≥ n
m = n + (m - n)
 
n, m: nat
H: m ≥ n
m = m - n + n
 
n, m: nat
H: m ≥ n
m = m
n, m: nat
H: m ≥ n
m ≥ n

      
n, m: nat
H: m ≥ n
m = m
 apply idpath.
      
n, m: nat
H: m ≥ n
m ≥ n
 apply H.
    
n, m: nat
H: m ≥ n
m ≥ m - n
 apply natminusgehn.
Qed.

(** *** Comparisons and [n -> n - 1] *)


n, m: nat
n > m → n > m - 1


n, m: nat
n > m → n > m - 1

  
n, m: nat
is: n > m
n > m - 1
 
n: nat
is: n > 0
n > 0 - 1
n, m: nat
is: n > S m
IHm: n > m → n > m - 1
n > S m - 1

  
n: nat
is: n > 0
n > 0 - 1
 apply is.
  
n, m: nat
is: n > S m
IHm: n > m → n > m - 1
n > S m - 1
 
n, m: nat
is: n > S m
IHm: n > m → n > m - 1
natgtb n (m - 0) = true
 
n, m: nat
is: n > S m
IHm: n > m → n > m - 1
natgtb n m = true
 
n, m: nat
is: n > S m
IHm: n > m → n > m - 1
n ≥ S m
n, m: nat
is: n > S m
IHm: n > m → n > m - 1
S m > m

    
n, m: nat
is: n > S m
IHm: n > m → n > m - 1
n ≥ S m
 apply (natgthtogeh _ _ is).
    
n, m: nat
is: n > S m
IHm: n > m → n > m - 1
S m > m
 apply natgthsnn.
Qed.

Definition natlthtolthm1 (n m : nat) : n < m -> n - 1 < m := natgthtogthm1 _ _.

Definition natlehtolehm1 (n m : nat) : n ≤ m -> n - 1 ≤ m := (fun X : n ≤ m => natlthtolthm1 n (S m) X).

Definition natgehtogehm1 (n m : nat) : n ≥ m -> n ≥ m - 1 := natlehtolehm1 _ _.


n, m: nat
n > m → n - 1 ≥ m


n, m: nat
n > m → n - 1 ≥ m

  
n: nat
∏ m : nat, n > m → n - 1 ≥ m
 
∏ m : nat, 0 > m → 0 - 1 ≥ m
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n > m → n - 1 ≥ m
∏ m : nat, S n > m → S n - 1 ≥ m

  
∏ m : nat, 0 > m → 0 - 1 ≥ m
 
m: nat
X: 0 > m
0 - 1 ≥ m
 
m: nat
X: 0 > m
∅
 apply (negnatgth0n m X).
  
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n > m → n - 1 ≥ m
∏ m : nat, S n > m → S n - 1 ≥ m
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n > m → n - 1 ≥ m
m: nat
X: S n > m
S n - 1 ≥ m

X: S n > 0
S n - 1 ≥ 0
n: nat

m: nat
X: S n > S m
IHm: S n > m → S n - 1 ≥ m
S n - 1 ≥ S m

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n > m → n - 1 ≥ m
X: S n > 0
S n - 1 ≥ 0
 apply idpath.
    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n > m → n - 1 ≥ m
m: nat
X: S n > S m
IHm: S n > m → S n - 1 ≥ m
S n - 1 ≥ S m
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n > m → n - 1 ≥ m
m: nat
X: S n > S m
IHm: S n > m → S n - 1 ≥ m
natgtb (n - 0) m = true
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n > m → n - 1 ≥ m
m: nat
X: S n > S m
IHm: S n > m → S n - 1 ≥ m
natgtb n m = true
 apply X.
Qed.

(*
Definition natgehandminuslinv (n m k : nat) (is' : natgeh k n)
(is : natleh  (k - n) (k - m)) : natgeh n m.
Proof.
intros.
set (int := natgehgthtrans _ (k - n) _ is (minusgeh0 _ _ is')).
set (int' := minusgeh0inv _ _ int).
set (int'' := natlehandplusr _ _ n is).
rewrite (minusplusnmm _ _ (natgthtogeh _ _ is')) in int''.
set (int''' := natlehandplusr _ _ m int'').
rewrite (natplusassoc _ n _) in int'''.
rewrite (natpluscomm n m) in int'''.
destruct (natplusassoc (k - m) m n) in int'''.
rewrite (minusplusnmm _ _ (natgthtogeh _ _ int')) in int'''.
apply (natgehandpluslinv _ _ k). apply int'''.
Defined.





induction n as [ | n IHn ]. intros.
rewrite (nat0gehtois0 _ is') in is.
rewrite (natminuseqn m) in is.
rewrite (nat0gehtois0 _ is).
apply isreflnatleh.
intro m. induction m. intros. apply natgehn0. intros.
destruct k.
rewrite natminuseqn in is. rewrite natminuseqn in is.
apply is. apply (IHn m k is is').
Defined.


(removed to lBsystems)
Definition natgthandminusinvr (n m k : nat) (is : natgth n m)
(is' : natgth n k) : natgth (n - k) (m - k).
Proof.
intro n. induction n as [ | n IHn ].
intros. destruct (negnatgth0n _ is). intro m. induction m. intros. destruct k.
apply natgthsn0. apply (IHapply natgehn0. intro k. induction k. intro is.
apply is. intro is.  apply (IHn m k is).
 Defined.



(removed to lBsystems)
Definition natlehandminusl (n m k : nat) (is : natgeh n m) :
natgeh (k - m) (k - n).
Proof.
intro n. induction n as [ | n IHn ].
intros. rewrite (nat0gehtois0 _ is).
apply isreflnatleh. intro m. induction m. intros.
destruct k.
apply natminuslehn. apply natminuslehn.
intro k. induction k. intro is.
apply isreflnatleh. intro is.
apply (IHn m k). apply is.
Defined.

Definition natlehandminusr

Definition natlthandminusl (n m k : nat) (is : natgth n m) (is' : natgeh k n) :
natlth (k - n) (k - m).
Proof.
intro n. induction n as [ | n IHn ].
intros. destruct (negnatgth0n _ is).
intro m. induction m. intros. destruct k.
destruct (negnatgeh0sn _ is').
apply (natlehlthtrans _ k _).
apply (natminuslehn k n).
apply natlthnsn.
intro k. induction k. intros is is'.
destruct (negnatgeh0sn _ is'). intros is is'.
apply (IHn m k is is').
Defined.

Definition natlehandminusl (n m k : nat) (is : natgeh n m) :
natleh (k - n) (k - m).
Proof.
intro n. induction n as [ | n IHn ].
intros. rewrite (nat0gehtois0 _ is).
apply isreflnatleh.
intro m. induction m. intros. destruct k.
apply natminuslehn. apply natminuslehn.
intro k. induction k. intro is.
apply isreflnatleh. intro is.
apply (IHn m k). apply is.
Defined.


Definition natlehandminusl (n m k : nat) : (n ≤ m) -> natgeh (k - n) (k - m)
:= natlehandminusl m n k.

Definition natlehandminusr (n m k : nat) : (n ≤ m) -> (n - k) ≤ (m - k)
:= natgehandminusr m n k.




(* *** One sided minus and comparisons *)


(* *** Greater or equal and minus *)

(* See lBsystems.v *)



(* **** Less and minus *)


Definition natlthrightminus (n m k : nat) (is : natlth (n + m) k) :
natlth n (k - m).

Definition natlthrightplus (n m k : nat) (is : natlth (n - m) k) :
natlth n (k + m).

Definition natlthleftminus (n m k : nat) (is : natlth n (m + k)) :
natlth (n - k) m.

Definition natlthleftplus (n m k : nat) (is : natlth n (m - k)) :
natlth (n + k) m.


(* **** Less or equal and minus *)


Definition natlehrightminus (n m k : nat) (is : (n + m) ≤ k) : n ≤ (k - m).

Definition natlehrightplus (n m k : nat) (is : (n - m) ≤ k) : n ≤ (k + m).

Definition natlehleftminus (n m k : nat) (is : n ≤ (m + k)) : (n - k) ≤ m.

Definition natlehleftplus (n m k : nat) (is : n ≤ (m - k)) : (n + k) ≤ m.










(* *** Mixed plus/minus associativities.

There are four possible plus/minus associativities which are labelled by
pp, pm, mp and mm depending on where in the side with the left parenthesis
one has minuses and where one has pluses. Two of those - pp and mm, are
unconditional. Two others require a condition to hold as equality and also
provide an unconditional inequality. Alltogether we have six statements
including a repeat of the usual pp associativity which we give here another
name in accrdance with the general naming scheme for these statements. *)

Notation natassocppeq := natplusassoc.

(* see lBsystems *)

Definition natassocpmineq (n m k : nat) : natleh ((n + m) - k) (n + (m - k)).
Proof.
intros k. destruct (natgthorleh k m) as [g | le].

set (e := minuseq0 m k (natgthtogeh _ _ g)).
rewrite e. rewrite (natplusr0 n).
destruct (boolchoice (natgtb k (n+m))) as [ g' | le'].
set (e' := minuseq0 (n+m) k (natgthtogeh _ _ g')).  rewrite e'.
apply natleh0n. apply (natlehandplusrinv _ _ k).
rewrite (minusplusnmm _ k).
apply natlehandplusl.
apply (natlthtoleh _ _ g).
set (int := falsetonegtrue _ le').
assumption.

rewrite (natassocpmeq _ _ _ le).
apply isreflnatleh.
Defined.


(* see lBsystems *)

Definition natassocmpineq (n m k : nat) : natgeh ((n - m) + k) (n - (m - k)).
Proof.
intros k. destruct (natgthorleh k m) as [g | le].

set (e := minuseq0 m k (natgthtogeh _ _ g)).
rewrite e. rewrite (natminuseqn n). apply (natgehandplusrinv _ _ m).
rewrite (natplusassoc _ _ m). rewrite (natpluscomm _ m).
destruct (natplusassoc (n - m) m k).
assert (int1 : natgeh (n - m + m + k) (n + k)).
apply (natgehandplusr _ _ k).
apply minusplusnmmineq.
assert (int2 : natgeh (n + k) (n + m)).
apply (natgehandplusl _ _ n).
apply (natgthtogeh _ _ g).
apply (istransnatgeh _ _ _ int1 int2).

destruct (natgthorleh m n) as [g' | le'].
rewrite (minuseq0 _ _ (natgthtogeh _ _ g')). change (0 + k) with k.
apply (natgehandplusrinv _ _ (m - k)).
rewrite (natpluscomm k _). rewrite (minusplusnmm _ _ le).

destruct (natgthorleh (m - k) n) as [ g'' | le'' ].
rewrite (minuseq0 n (m - k) (natgthtogeh _ _ g'')).
apply (natminuslehn  m k). rewrite (minusplusnmm _ _ le'').
apply (natgthtogeh _ _ g').

rewrite (natassocmpeq _ _ _ le' le). apply isreflnatgeh.
Defined.




Definition natassocpmineq (n m k : nat) : natleh ((n + m) - k) (n + (m - k)).
Proof.
intros k. destruct (natgthorleh k m) as [g | le].

set (e := minuseq0 m k (natgthtogeh _ _ g)).
rewrite e. rewrite (natplusr0 n).
destruct (boolchoice (natgtb k (n+m))) as [ g' | le'].
set (e' := minuseq0 (n+m) k (natgthtogeh _ _ g')). rewrite e'.
apply natleh0n. apply (natlehandplusrinv _ _ k).
rewrite (minusplusnmm _ k). apply natlehandplusl.
apply (natlthtoleh _ _ g). set (int := falsetonegtrue _ le').
assumption.

rewrite (natassocpmeq _ _ _ le). apply isreflnatleh. Defined.
*)


(** *** Basic algebraic properties of [mul] on [nat].

  We no longer user [mult]. *)


n: nat
0 * n = 0


n: nat
0 * n = 0

  apply idpath.
Defined.
#[global]
Hint Resolve natmult0n : natarith.


n: nat
n * 0 = 0


n: nat
n * 0 = 0

  
0 * 0 = 0
n: nat
IHn: n * 0 = 0
S n * 0 = 0

  
0 * 0 = 0
 apply idpath.
  
n: nat
IHn: n * 0 = 0
S n * 0 = 0
 
n: nat
IHn: n * 0 = 0
n * 0 + 0 = 0
 exact (natplusr0 _ @ IHn).
Defined.
#[global]
Hint Resolve natmultn0 : natarith.


n, m: nat
S n * m = m + n * m


n, m: nat
S n * m = m + n * m

  
n, m: nat
S n * m = m + n * m
 
n, m: nat
n * m + m = m + n * m
 apply natpluscomm.
Defined.
#[global]
Hint Resolve multsnm : natarith.


n, m: nat
n * S m = n + n * m


n, m: nat
n * S m = n + n * m

  
n: nat
∏ m : nat, n * S m = n + n * m

  
∏ m : nat, 0 * S m = 0 + 0 * m
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n * S m = n + n * m
∏ m : nat, S n * S m = S n + S n * m

  
∏ m : nat, 0 * S m = 0 + 0 * m
 
m: nat
0 * S m = 0 + 0 * m

    apply idpath.
  
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n * S m = n + n * m
∏ m : nat, S n * S m = S n + S n * m
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n * S m = n + n * m
m: nat
S n * S m = S n + S n * m
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n * S m = n + n * m
m: nat
n * S m + S m = S (n + (n * m + m))

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n * S m = n + n * m
m: nat
n * S m + S m = S (n + n * m + m)

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n * S m = n + n * m
m: nat
n * S m + S m = S (m + (n + n * m))

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n * S m = n + n * m
m: nat
n * S m + S m = S m + (n + n * m)

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n * S m = n + n * m
m: nat
n * S m + S m = n + n * m + S m

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n * S m = n + n * m
m: nat
n * S m = n + n * m

    apply IHn.
Defined.
#[global]
Hint Resolve multnsm : natarith.


n, m: nat
n * m = m * n


n, m: nat
n * m = m * n

  
n: nat
∏ m : nat, n * m = m * n
 
∏ m : nat, 0 * m = m * 0
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n * m = m * n
∏ m : nat, S n * m = m * S n

  
∏ m : nat, 0 * m = m * 0
 
m: nat
0 * m = m * 0
 auto with natarith.
  
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n * m = m * n
∏ m : nat, S n * m = m * S n
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n * m = m * n
m: nat
S n * m = m * S n
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n * m = m * n
m: nat
m + n * m = m * S n
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, n * m = m * n
m: nat
m + n * m = m + m * n

    apply (maponpaths (λ x : _, m + x) (IHn m)).
Defined.


n, m, k: nat
(n + m) * k = n * k + m * k


n, m, k: nat
(n + m) * k = n * k + m * k

  
n, m, k: nat
(n + m) * k = n * k + m * k

  
m, k: nat
(0 + m) * k = 0 * k + m * k
n, m, k: nat
IHn: (n + m) * k = n * k + m * k
(S n + m) * k = S n * k + m * k

  
m, k: nat
(0 + m) * k = 0 * k + m * k
 apply idpath.
  
n, m, k: nat
IHn: (n + m) * k = n * k + m * k
(S n + m) * k = S n * k + m * k
 
n, m, k: nat
IHn: (n + m) * k = n * k + m * k
(n + m) * k + k = n * k + k + m * k

    
n, m, k: nat
IHn: (n + m) * k = n * k + m * k
(n + m) * k + k = n * k + (k + m * k)
 
n, m, k: nat
IHn: (n + m) * k = n * k + m * k
(n + m) * k + k = n * k + (m * k + k)

    
n, m, k: nat
IHn: (n + m) * k = n * k + m * k
(n + m) * k + k = n * k + m * k + k

    exact (maponpaths (λ x, x+k) IHn).
Defined.


m, k, n: nat
n * (m + k) = n * m + n * k


m, k, n: nat
n * (m + k) = n * m + n * k

  
k, n: nat
n * (0 + k) = n * 0 + n * k
m, k, n: nat
IHm: n * (m + k) = n * m + n * k
n * (S m + k) = n * S m + n * k

  
k, n: nat
n * (0 + k) = n * 0 + n * k
 
k, n: nat
n * k = n * 0 + n * k
 
k, n: nat
n * k = 0 + n * k
 auto with natarith.
  
m, k, n: nat
IHm: n * (m + k) = n * m + n * k
n * (S m + k) = n * S m + n * k
 
m, k, n: nat
IHm: n * (m + k) = n * m + n * k
n * S (m + k) = n * S m + n * k
 
m, k, n: nat
IHm: n * (m + k) = n * m + n * k
n + n * (m + k) = n * S m + n * k
 
m, k, n: nat
IHm: n * (m + k) = n * m + n * k
n + n * (m + k) = n + n * m + n * k

    
m, k, n: nat
IHm: n * (m + k) = n * m + n * k
n + n * (m + k) = n + (n * m + n * k)

    apply (maponpaths (λ x : _, n + x) (IHm)).
Defined.


n, m, k: nat
n * m * k = n * (m * k)


n, m, k: nat
n * m * k = n * (m * k)

  
m, k: nat
0 * m * k = 0 * (m * k)
n, m, k: nat
IHn: n * m * k = n * (m * k)
S n * m * k = S n * (m * k)

  
m, k: nat
0 * m * k = 0 * (m * k)
 apply idpath.
  
n, m, k: nat
IHn: n * m * k = n * (m * k)
S n * m * k = S n * (m * k)
 
n, m, k: nat
IHn: n * m * k = n * (m * k)
(n * m + m) * k = n * (m * k) + m * k

    
n, m, k: nat
IHn: n * m * k = n * (m * k)
n * m * k + m * k = n * (m * k) + m * k

    
n, m, k: nat
IHn: n * m * k = n * (m * k)
n * m * k = n * (m * k)

    apply IHn.
Defined.


n: nat
1 * n = n


n: nat
1 * n = n

  
n: nat
n = n
 auto with natarith.
Defined.

Hint Resolve natmultl1 : natarith.


n: nat
n * 1 = n


n: nat
n * 1 = n

1 * n = n
 auto with natarith.
Defined.
#[global]
Hint Resolve natmultr1 : natarith.

(** *** Cancellation properties of [mul] on [nat] *)


n, m: nat
m ≠ 0 → n + m ≠ 0


n, m: nat
m ≠ 0 → n + m ≠ 0

  
n, m: nat
ne: m ≠ 0
n + m ≠ 0
 
m: nat
ne: m ≠ 0
0 + m ≠ 0
n, m: nat
ne: m ≠ 0
S n + m ≠ 0

  
m: nat
ne: m ≠ 0
0 + m ≠ 0
 assumption.
  
n, m: nat
ne: m ≠ 0
S n + m ≠ 0
 exact tt.
Defined.

n ≠ 0 → m ≠ 0 → n * m ≠ 0

ism: m ≠ 0

ism: m ≠ 0

ism: m ≠ 0

ism: m ≠ 0
0 * m ≠ 0

isn: 0 ≠ 0
ism: m ≠ 0
∅

ism: m ≠ 0
IHn: n ≠ 0 → n * m ≠ 0

ism: m ≠ 0

S n * m ≠ 0

ism: m ≠ 0

n * m + m ≠ 0
 
n, m: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
IHn: n ≠ 0 → n * m ≠ 0
m ≠ 0
 assumption.
Defined.

n * m ≠ 0 → n ≠ 0

∏ m : nat, 0 * m ≠ 0 → 0 ≠ 0
 
m: nat
r: 0 * m ≠ 0
0 ≠ 0

n: nat
∏ m : nat, S n * m ≠ 0 → S n ≠ 0
 
n: nat
S n ≠ 0
 apply natneqsx0.
Defined.


n, m: nat
n * m ≠ 0 → m ≠ 0


n, m: nat
n * m ≠ 0 → m ≠ 0

n * 0 ≠ 0 → 0 ≠ 0
n, m: nat

n * 0 ≠ 0 → 0 ≠ 0
 
n: nat
r: n * 0 ≠ 0
0 ≠ 0
 
n: nat
r: n * 0 ≠ 0
∅
 apply (nat_neq_to_nopath r), natmultn0.
  
n, m: nat
n * S m ≠ 0 → S m ≠ 0
 
n, m: nat
S m ≠ 0
 apply natneqsx0.
Defined.

(** *** Multiplication and comparisons  *)

(** [natgth] *)


n, m, k: nat
k ≠ 0 → n > m → k * n > k * m


n, m, k: nat
k ≠ 0 → n > m → k * n > k * m

∏ m k : nat, k ≠ 0 → S n > m → k * S n > k * m

  
∏ m k : nat, k ≠ 0 → 0 > m → k * 0 > k * m

g: k ≠ 0
g': 0 > m
k * 0 > k * m
 induction (negnatgth0n _ g').

∏ m k : nat, k ≠ 0 → S n > m → k * S n > k * m

k * S n > k * 0

k + k * n > 0

IHn: ∏ m k : nat, k ≠ 0 → n > m → k * n > k * m

g: k ≠ 0
g': S n > S m
k + k * n > k * S m

k * n > k * m → n > m

k: nat
X: k * S n > k * 0
S n > 0
 apply (natgthsn0 _).
    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m k : nat, k * n > k * m → n > m
m: nat
∏ k : nat, k * S n > k * S m → S n > S m
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m k : nat, k * n > k * m → n > m
m, k: nat
g: k * S n > k * S m
S n > S m

m, k: nat
g: k + k * n > k * S m
S n > S m
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m k : nat, k * n > k * m → n > m
m, k: nat
g: k + k * n > k + k * m
S n > S m

      apply (IHn m k (natgthandpluslinv _ _ k g)).
Defined.


n, m, k: nat
n * k > m * k → n > m


n, m, k: nat
n * k > m * k → n > m

  
n, m, k: nat
g: n * k > m * k
n > m

  
n, m, k: nat
g: k * n > m * k
n > m
 
n, m, k: nat
g: k * n > k * m
n > m

  apply (natgthandmultlinv n m k g).
Defined.

(** [natlth] *)

Definition natlthandmultl (n m k : nat) : k ≠ 0 -> n < m -> k * n < k * m := natgthandmultl _ _ _.

Definition natlthandmultr (n m k : nat) : k ≠ 0 -> n < m -> n * k < m * k := natgthandmultr _ _ _.

Definition natlthandmultlinv (n m k : nat) : k * n < k * m -> n < m := natgthandmultlinv _ _ _.

Definition natlthandmultrinv (n m k : nat) : n * k < m * k -> n < m := natgthandmultrinv _ _ _.

(** [natleh] *)


n, m, k: nat
n ≤ m → k * n ≤ k * m


n, m, k: nat
n ≤ m → k * n ≤ k * m

  
n, m, k: nat
r: n ≤ m
k * n ≤ k * m
 
n, m, k: nat
r: n ≤ m
t: k * n > k * m
∅

  
n, m, k: nat
r: n ≤ m
t: k * n > k * m
n > m
 
n, m, k: nat
r: n ≤ m
t: k * n > k * m
k * n > k * m
 assumption.
Defined.


n, m, k: nat
n ≤ m → n * k ≤ m * k


n, m, k: nat
n ≤ m → n * k ≤ m * k

  
n, m, k: nat
r: n ≤ m
n * k ≤ m * k
 
n, m, k: nat
r: n ≤ m
t: n * k > m * k
∅

  
n, m, k: nat
r: n ≤ m
t: n * k > m * k
n > m

  
n, m, k: nat
r: n ≤ m
t: n * k > m * k
n * k > m * k
 assumption.
Defined.


n, m, k: nat
k ≠ 0 → k * n ≤ k * m → n ≤ m


n, m, k: nat
k ≠ 0 → k * n ≤ k * m → n ≤ m

  
n, m, k: nat
r: k ≠ 0
s: k * n ≤ k * m
n ≤ m
 
n, m, k: nat
r: k ≠ 0
s: k * n ≤ k * m
t: n > m
∅

  
n, m, k: nat
r: k ≠ 0
s: k * n ≤ k * m
t: n > m
k * n > k * m

  
n, m, k: nat
r: k ≠ 0
s: k * n ≤ k * m
t: n > m
n > m
 assumption.
Defined.


n, m, k: nat
k ≠ 0 → n * k ≤ m * k → n ≤ m

k ≠ 0 → n * k ≤ m * k → n ≤ m

r: k ≠ 0
s: n * k ≤ m * k
n ≤ m

r: k ≠ 0
s: n * k ≤ m * k
t: n > m
∅

  
n, m, k: nat
r: k ≠ 0
s: n * k ≤ m * k
t: n > m
n * k > m * k

  
n, m, k: nat
r: k ≠ 0
s: n * k ≤ m * k
t: n > m
n > m
 assumption.
Defined.

(** [natgeh] *)

Definition natgehandmultl (n m k : nat) : n ≥ m -> (k * n) ≥ (k * m) := natlehandmultl _ _ _.

Definition natgehandmultr (n m k : nat) : n ≥ m -> (n * k) ≥ (m * k) := natlehandmultr _ _ _.

Definition natgehandmultlinv (n m k : nat) : k ≠ 0 -> k * n ≥ k * m -> n ≥ m := natlehandmultlinv _ _ _.

Definition natgehandmultrinv (n m k : nat) : k ≠ 0 -> n * k ≥ m * k -> n ≥ m := natlehandmultrinv _ _ _.

(** *** Division with a remainder on [nat]

For technical reasons it is more convenient to introduce divison with remainder
for all pairs (n,m) including pairs of the form (n,0). *)


n, m: nat
nat × nat


n, m: nat
nat × nat

  
n, m: nat
nat × nat
 
m: nat
nat × nat
n, m: nat
IHn: nat × nat
nat × nat

  
m: nat
nat × nat
 
m: nat
nat × nat
 apply (make_dirprod 0 0).
  
n, m: nat
IHn: nat × nat
nat × nat
 
n, m: nat
IHn: nat × nat
a: S (pr2 IHn) < m
nat × nat
n, m: nat
IHn: nat × nat
b: S (pr2 IHn) ≥ m
nat × nat

    
n, m: nat
IHn: nat × nat
a: S (pr2 IHn) < m
nat × nat
 apply (make_dirprod (pr1 IHn) (S (pr2 IHn))).
    
n, m: nat
IHn: nat × nat
b: S (pr2 IHn) ≥ m
nat × nat
 apply (make_dirprod (S (pr1 IHn)) 0).
Defined.

Definition natdiv (n m : nat) : nat := pr1 (natdivrem n m).

Definition natrem (n m : nat) : nat := pr2 (natdivrem n m).

Notation " x /+ y " := (natrem x y) (at level 40, left associativity) : nat_scope.

Setting y constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"_ / _".



n, m: nat
m ≠ 0 → n /+ m < m


n, m: nat
m ≠ 0 → n /+ m < m

  
n, m: nat
m ≠ 0 → pr2 (natdivrem n m) < m
 
n, m: nat
is: m ≠ 0
pr2 (natdivrem n m) < m
 
m: nat
is: m ≠ 0
pr2 (natdivrem 0 m) < m
n, m: nat
is: m ≠ 0
pr2 (natdivrem (S n) m) < m

  
m: nat
is: m ≠ 0
pr2 (natdivrem 0 m) < m
 
m: nat
is: m ≠ 0
natgtb m 0 = true
 
m: nat
is: m ≠ 0
natgtb m 0 = true
 apply (natneq0togth0 _ is).
  
n, m: nat
is: m ≠ 0
pr2 (natdivrem (S n) m) < m
 
n, m: nat
is: m ≠ 0
natgtb m
  (pr2
     (coprod_rect
        (λ _ : (natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) =
                true)
               ⨿ (match m with
                  | S (S m1) =>
                      natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
                  | _ => true
                  end = true), nat × nat)
        (λ _ : natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) =
               true,
         make_dirprod (pr1 (natdivrem n m))
           (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))))
        (λ _ : match m with
               | S (S m1) =>
                   natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
               | _ => true
               end = true,
         make_dirprod (S (pr1 (natdivrem n m))) 0)
        (natlthorgeh (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) m))) =
true
 
n, m: nat
is: m ≠ 0
nt: S (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) < m
natgtb m
  (pr2
     (coprod_rect
        (λ _ : (natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) =
                true)
               ⨿ (match m with
                  | S (S m1) =>
                      natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
                  | _ => true
                  end = true), nat × nat)
        (λ _ : natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) =
               true,
         make_dirprod (pr1 (natdivrem n m))
           (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))))
        (λ _ : match m with
               | S (S m1) =>
                   natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
               | _ => true
               end = true,
         make_dirprod (S (pr1 (natdivrem n m))) 0)
        (inl nt))) = true
n, m: nat
is: m ≠ 0
t: S (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) ≥ m
natgtb m
  (pr2
     (coprod_rect
        (λ _ : (natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) =
                true)
               ⨿ (match m with
                  | S (S m1) =>
                      natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
                  | _ => true
                  end = true), nat × nat)
        (λ _ : natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) =
               true,
         make_dirprod (pr1 (natdivrem n m))
           (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))))
        (λ _ : match m with
               | S (S m1) =>
                   natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
               | _ => true
               end = true,
         make_dirprod (S (pr1 (natdivrem n m))) 0)
        (inr t))) = true

    
n, m: nat
is: m ≠ 0
nt: S (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) < m
natgtb m
  (pr2
     (coprod_rect
        (λ _ : (natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) =
                true)
               ⨿ (match m with
                  | S (S m1) =>
                      natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
                  | _ => true

        (λ _ : natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) =

     (coprod_rect

n = n /+ m + n / m * m

n = n /+ m + n / m * m

  
n: nat
∏ m : nat, m ≠ 0 → n = n /+ m + n / m * m
 
∏ m : nat, m ≠ 0 → 0 = 0 /+ m + 0 / m * m
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, m ≠ 0 → n = n /+ m + n / m * m

∏ m : nat, m ≠ 0 → 0 = 0

is: m ≠ 0
0 = 0
 apply idpath.
  
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, m ≠ 0 → n = n /+ m + n / m * m
∏ m : nat, m ≠ 0 → S n = S n /+ m + S n / m * m
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, m ≠ 0 → n = n /+ m + n / m * m

is: m ≠ 0
S n = S n /+ m + S n / m * m
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, m ≠ 0 → n = n /+ m + n / m * m

is: m ≠ 0
S n = pr2 (natdivrem (S n) m) + S n / m * m
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, m ≠ 0 → n = n /+ m + n / m * m
m: nat
is: m ≠ 0
S n =
pr2 (natdivrem (S n) m) + pr1 (natdivrem (S n) m) * m
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, m ≠ 0 → n = n /+ m + n / m * m
m: nat
is: m ≠ 0
S n =
pr2
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) = true)
            ⨿ (match m with
               | S (S m1) =>
                   natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
               | _ => true
               end = true), nat × nat)
     (λ _ : natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) = true,
      make_dirprod (pr1 (natdivrem n m))
        (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))))
     (λ _ : match m with
            | S (S m1) =>
                natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
            | _ => true
            end = true,
      make_dirprod (S (pr1 (natdivrem n m))) 0)
     (natlthorgeh (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) m)) +
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) = true)
            ⨿ (match m with
               | S (S m1) =>
                   natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
               | _ => true
               end = true), nat × nat)
     (λ _ : natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) = true,
      make_dirprod (pr1 (natdivrem n m))
        (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))))
     (λ _ : match m with
            | S (S m1) =>
                natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
            | _ => true
            end = true,
      make_dirprod (S (pr1 (natdivrem n m))) 0)
     (natlthorgeh (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) m)) * m

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, m ≠ 0 → n = n /+ m + n / m * m
m: nat
is: m ≠ 0
nt: S (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) < m
S n =
pr2
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) = true)
            ⨿ (match m with
               | S (S m1) =>
                   natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
               | _ => true
               end = true), nat × nat)
     (λ _ : natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) = true,
      make_dirprod (pr1 (natdivrem n m))
        (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))))
     (λ _ : match m with
            | S (S m1) =>
                natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
            | _ => true
            end = true,
      make_dirprod (S (pr1 (natdivrem n m))) 0)
     (inl nt)) +
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) = true)
            ⨿ (match m with
               | S (S m1) =>
                   natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
               | _ => true
               end = true), nat × nat)
     (λ _ : natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) = true,
      make_dirprod (pr1 (natdivrem n m))
        (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))))
     (λ _ : match m with
            | S (S m1) =>
                natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
            | _ => true
            end = true,
      make_dirprod (S (pr1 (natdivrem n m))) 0)
     (inl nt)) * m
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, m ≠ 0 → n = n /+ m + n / m * m
m: nat
is: m ≠ 0
t: S (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) ≥ m
S n =
pr2
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) = true)
            ⨿ (match m with
               | S (S m1) =>
                   natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
               | _ => true
               end = true), nat × nat)
     (λ _ : natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) = true,
      make_dirprod (pr1 (natdivrem n m))
        (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))))
     (λ _ : match m with
            | S (S m1) =>
                natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
            | _ => true
            end = true,
      make_dirprod (S (pr1 (natdivrem n m))) 0)
     (inr t)) +
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) = true)
            ⨿ (match m with
               | S (S m1) =>
                   natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
               | _ => true
               end = true), nat × nat)
     (λ _ : natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) = true,
      make_dirprod (pr1 (natdivrem n m))
        (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))))
     (λ _ : match m with
            | S (S m1) =>
                natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
            | _ => true
            end = true,
      make_dirprod (S (pr1 (natdivrem n m))) 0)
     (inr t)) * m

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, m ≠ 0 → n = n /+ m + n / m * m
m: nat
is: m ≠ 0
nt: S (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) < m
S n =
pr2
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) = true)
            ⨿ (match m with
               | S (S m1) =>
                   natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
               | _ => true
               end = true), nat × nat)
     (λ _ : natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) = true,
      make_dirprod (pr1 (natdivrem n m))
        (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))))
     (λ _ : match m with
            | S (S m1) =>
                natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
            | _ => true
            end = true,
      make_dirprod (S (pr1 (natdivrem n m))) 0)
     (inl nt)) +
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) = true)
            ⨿ (match m with
               | S (S m1) =>
                   natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
               | _ => true
               end = true), nat × nat)
     (λ _ : natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) = true,
      make_dirprod (pr1 (natdivrem n m))
        (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))))
     (λ _ : match m with
            | S (S m1) =>
                natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
            | _ => true
            end = true,
      make_dirprod (S (pr1 (natdivrem n m))) 0)
     (inl nt)) * m
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, m ≠ 0 → n = n /+ m + n / m * m
m: nat
is: m ≠ 0
nt: S (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) < m
S n =
S (pr2 (natdivrem n m) + pr1 (natdivrem n m) * m)
 apply (maponpaths S (IHn m is)).
    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, m ≠ 0 → n = n /+ m + n / m * m
m: nat
is: m ≠ 0
t: S (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) ≥ m
S n =
pr2
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) = true)
            ⨿ (match m with
               | S (S m1) =>
                   natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
               | _ => true
               end = true), nat × nat)
     (λ _ : natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) = true,
      make_dirprod (pr1 (natdivrem n m))
        (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))))
     (λ _ : match m with
            | S (S m1) =>
                natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
            | _ => true
            end = true,
      make_dirprod (S (pr1 (natdivrem n m))) 0)
     (inr t)) +
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) = true)
            ⨿ (match m with
               | S (S m1) =>
                   natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
               | _ => true
               end = true), nat × nat)
     (λ _ : natgtb m (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))) = true,
      make_dirprod (pr1 (natdivrem n m))
        (S (pr2 (natdivrem n m))))
     (λ _ : match m with
            | S (S m1) =>
                natgtb (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) m1
            | _ => true
            end = true,
      make_dirprod (S (pr1 (natdivrem n m))) 0)
     (inr t)) * m
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, m ≠ 0 → n = n /+ m + n / m * m
m: nat
is: m ≠ 0
t: S (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) ≥ m
S n = pr1 (natdivrem n m) * m + m

IHn: ∏ m : nat, m ≠ 0 → n = n /+ m + n / m * m
m: nat
is: m ≠ 0
t: S (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) ≥ m
is':= lthnatrem n m is: n /+ m < m
S n = pr1 (natdivrem n m) * m + m

      
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, m ≠ 0 → n = n /+ m + n / m * m
m: nat
is: m ≠ 0
t: S (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) ≥ m
is':= lthnatrem n m is: n /+ m < m
h: m > S (n /+ m)
S n = pr1 (natdivrem n m) * m + m
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, m ≠ 0 → n = n /+ m + n / m * m

is: m ≠ 0
t: S (pr2 (natdivrem n m)) ≥ m
is':= lthnatrem n m is: n /+ m < m
e: m = S (n /+ m)

e'':= maponpaths S (IHn m is): S n = S (n /+ m + n / m * m)

Defined.
Opaque natdivremrule.


n, m: nat
is: m ≠ 0
n / m * m ≤ n


n, m: nat
is: m ≠ 0
n / m * m ≤ n

  
n, m: nat
is: m ≠ 0
n / m * m ≤ n

is: m ≠ 0

n / m * m ≤ n

is: m ≠ 0
e:= natdivremrule n m is: n = n /+ m + n / m * m
int:= n / m * m: nat
int ≤ n

  
n, m: nat
is: m ≠ 0
e:= natdivremrule n m is: n = n /+ m + n / m * m
int:= n / m * m: nat
int ≤ n /+ m + n / m * m

  apply natlehmplusnm.
Defined.


m, i, j, i', j': nat
lj: j < m
lj': j' < m
e: j + i * m = j' + i' * m
i = i' × j = j'


m, i, j, i', j': nat
lj: j < m
lj': j' < m
e: j + i * m = j' + i' * m
i = i' × j = j'

  
m, i: nat
∏ j i' j' : nat,
j < m
→ j' < m → j + i * m = j' + i' * m → i = i' × j = j'
 
m: nat
∏ j i' j' : nat,
j < m
→ j' < m → j + 0 * m = j' + i' * m → 0 = i' × j = j'
m, i: nat
IHi: ∏ j i' j' : nat, j < m → j' < m → j + i * m = j' + i' * m → i = i' × j = j'
∏ j i' j' : nat,
j < m
→ j' < m
  → j + S i * m = j' + i' * m → S i = i' × j = j'

  
m: nat
∏ j i' j' : nat,
j < m
→ j' < m → j + 0 * m = j' + i' * m → 0 = i' × j = j'
 
m, j, i', j': nat
lj: j < m
lj': j' < m
j + 0 * m = j' + i' * m → 0 = i' × j = j'

lj: j < m
lj': j' < m
j + 0 = j' + i' * m → 0 = i' × j = j'

lj: j < m
lj': j' < m
e: j + 0 = j' + i' * m
0 = i' × j = j'

e: j + 0 = j' + i' * m

lj: j < m
lj': j' < m
e: j = j' + i' * m
0 = i' × j = j'

    
m, j, i', j': nat
lj: j' + i' * m < m
lj': j' < m
e: j = j' + i' * m
0 = i' × j = j'

    
m, j, j': nat
lj: j' + 0 * m < m
lj': j' < m
e: j = j' + 0 * m
0 = 0 × j = j'
m, j, i', j': nat
lj: j' + S i' * m < m
lj': j' < m
e: j = j' + S i' * m
IHi': j' + i' * m < m
→ j = j' + i' * m → 0 = i' × j = j'
0 = S i' × j = j'

lj: j' + 0 * m < m
lj': j' < m
e: j = j' + 0 * m
0 = 0 × j = j'

lj: j' + 0 * m < m
lj': j' < m
e: j = j' + 0
0 = 0 × j = j'

lj: j' + 0 * m < m
lj': j' < m
e: j = j'
0 = 0 × j = j'

      exact (idpath _,,e).
    
m, j, i', j': nat
lj: j' + S i' * m < m
lj': j' < m
e: j = j' + S i' * m
IHi': j' + i' * m < m
→ j = j' + i' * m → 0 = i' × j = j'
0 = S i' × j = j'

lj: j' + (i' * m + m) < m
lj': j' < m
e: j = j' + S i' * m
IHi': j' + i' * m < m
→ j = j' + i' * m → 0 = i' × j = j'
0 = S i' × j = j'

      
m, j, i', j': nat

lj': j' < m
e: j = j' + S i' * m

→ j = j' + i' * m → 0 = i' × j = j'
0 = S i' × j = j'

      induction (negnatgthmplusnm _ _ lj).
  
m, i: nat
IHi: ∏ j i' j' : nat,
j < m
→ j' < m
  → j + i * m = j' + i' * m → i = i' × j = j'
∏ j i' j' : nat,
j < m
→ j' < m
  → j + S i * m = j' + i' * m → S i = i' × j = j'

IHi: ∏ j i' j' : nat,
j < m
→ j' < m
  → j + i * m = j' + i' * m → i = i' × j = j'
j, i', j': nat
lj: j < m
lj': j' < m
e: j + S i * m = j' + i' * m
S i = i' × j = j'

    
m, i: nat

j < m
→ j' < m
  → j + i * m = j' + i' * m → i = i' × j = j'
j, j': nat
lj: j < m
lj': j' < m
e: j + S i * m = j' + 0 * m
S i = 0 × j = j'
m, i: nat
IHi: ∏ j i' j' : nat,
j < m
→ j' < m
  → j + i * m = j' + i' * m → i = i' × j = j'
j, i', j': nat
lj: j < m
lj': j' < m
e: j + S i * m = j' + S i' * m
IHi': j + S i * m = j' + i' * m → S i = i' × j = j'
S i = S i' × j = j'

→ j' < m
  → j + i * m = j' + i' * m → i = i' × j = j'

lj': j' < m
e: j + S i * m = j' + 0 * m
S i = 0 × j = j'

j < m
→ j' < m
  → j + i * m = j' + i' * m → i = i' × j = j'

lj: j < m
lj': j' < m
e: j + (i * m + m) = j' + 0
S i = 0 × j = j'

IHi: ∏ j i' j' : nat,
j < m
→ j' < m
  → j + i * m = j' + i' * m → i = i' × j = j'
j, j': nat
lj: j < m
lj': j' < m
e: j + (i * m + m) = j'
S i = 0 × j = j'

IHi: ∏ j i' j' : nat,
j < m
→ j' < m
  → j + i * m = j' + i' * m → i = i' × j = j'

lj: j < m
lj': j + (i * m + m) < m
e: j + (i * m + m) = j'

IHi: ∏ j i' j' : nat,
j < m
→ j' < m
  → j + i * m = j' + i' * m → i = i' × j = j'

lj': j + i * m + m < m
e: j + (i * m + m) = j'
S i = 0 × j = j'

      induction (negnatgthmplusnm _ _ lj').
    
m, i: nat
IHi: ∏ j i' j' : nat,
j < m
→ j' < m
  → j + i * m = j' + i' * m → i = i' × j = j'
j, i', j': nat
lj: j < m
lj': j' < m
e: j + S i * m = j' + S i' * m
IHi': j + S i * m = j' + i' * m → S i = i' × j = j'
S i = S i' × j = j'
 
m, i: nat
IHi: ∏ j i' j' : nat,
j < m
→ j' < m
  → j + i * m = j' + i' * m → i = i' × j = j'
j, i', j': nat
lj: j < m
lj': j' < m
e: j + (i * m + m) = j' + (i' * m + m)
IHi': j + S i * m = j' + i' * m → S i = i' × j = j'
S i = S i' × j = j'

      
m, i: nat
IHi: ∏ j i' j' : nat,
j < m
→ j' < m
  → j + i * m = j' + i' * m → i = i' × j = j'
j, i', j': nat
lj: j < m
lj': j' < m
e: j + i * m + m = j' + (i' * m + m)
IHi': j + S i * m = j' + i' * m → S i = i' × j = j'
S i = S i' × j = j'

      
m, i: nat
IHi: ∏ j i' j' : nat,
j < m
→ j' < m
  → j + i * m = j' + i' * m → i = i' × j = j'
j, i', j': nat
lj: j < m
lj': j' < m
e: j + i * m + m = j' + i' * m + m
IHi': j + S i * m = j' + i' * m → S i = i' × j = j'
S i = S i' × j = j'

      
m, i: nat
IHi: ∏ j i' j' : nat,
j < m
→ j' < m
  → j + i * m = j' + i' * m → i = i' × j = j'
j, i', j': nat
lj: j < m
lj': j' < m
e: j + i * m + m = j' + i' * m + m
IHi': j + S i * m = j' + i' * m → S i = i' × j = j'
e':= invmaponpathsincl (λ m0 : nat, m0 + m)
  (isinclnatplusr m) (j + i * m) 
  (j' + i' * m) e: j + i * m = j' + i' * m
S i = S i' × j = j'

      
m, i: nat
IHi: ∏ j i' j' : nat,
j < m
→ j' < m
  → j + i * m = j' + i' * m → i = i' × j = j'
j, i', j': nat
lj: j < m
lj': j' < m
e: j + i * m + m = j' + i' * m + m
IHi': j + S i * m = j' + i' * m → S i = i' × j = j'
e':= invmaponpathsincl (λ m0 : nat, m0 + m)
  (isinclnatplusr m) (j + i * m) 
  (j' + i' * m) e: j + i * m = j' + i' * m
ee:= IHi j i' j' lj lj' e': i = i' × j = j'
S i = S i' × j = j'

      exact (make_dirprod (maponpaths S (pr1 ee)) (pr2 ee)).
Defined.
Opaque natdivremunique.


n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
iskm: k * m ≠ 0
k * n / (k * m) = n / m
× k * n /+ (k * m) = k * (n /+ m)


n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
iskm: k * m ≠ 0
k * n / (k * m) = n / m
× k * n /+ (k * m) = k * (n /+ m)

  
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
iskm: k * m ≠ 0
k * n / (k * m) = n / m
× k * n /+ (k * m) = k * (n /+ m)

  
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
iskm: k * m ≠ 0
ak:= k * n / (k * m): nat
ak = n / m × k * n /+ (k * m) = k * (n /+ m)

  
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
iskm: k * m ≠ 0
ak:= k * n / (k * m): nat
bk:= k * n /+ (k * m): nat
ak = n / m × bk = k * (n /+ m)

  
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
iskm: k * m ≠ 0
ak:= k * n / (k * m): nat
bk:= k * n /+ (k * m): nat
a:= n / m: nat
ak = a × bk = k * (n /+ m)
 
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
iskm: k * m ≠ 0
ak:= k * n / (k * m): nat
bk:= k * n /+ (k * m): nat
a:= n / m: nat
b:= n /+ m: nat
ak = a × bk = k * b

  
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
iskm: k * m ≠ 0
ak:= k * n / (k * m): nat
bk:= k * n /+ (k * m): nat
a:= n / m: nat
b:= n /+ m: nat
bk + ak * (k * m) = b * k + a * (k * m)
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
iskm: k * m ≠ 0
ak:= k * n / (k * m): nat
bk:= k * n /+ (k * m): nat
a:= n / m: nat
b:= n /+ m: nat
e1: bk + ak * (k * m) = b * k + a * (k * m)
ak = a × bk = k * b

  
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
iskm: k * m ≠ 0
ak:= k * n / (k * m): nat
bk:= k * n /+ (k * m): nat
a:= n / m: nat
b:= n /+ m: nat
bk + ak * (k * m) = b * k + a * (k * m)

ism: m ≠ 0
iskm: k * m ≠ 0
ak:= k * n / (k * m): nat
bk:= k * n /+ (k * m): nat
a:= n / m: nat
b:= n /+ m: nat
bk + k * n / (k * m) * (k * m) = b * k + a * (k * m)
 
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
iskm: k * m ≠ 0
ak:= k * n / (k * m): nat
bk:= k * n /+ (k * m): nat
a:= n / m: nat
b:= n /+ m: nat
k * n /+ (k * m) + k * n / (k * m) * (k * m) =
b * k + a * (k * m)

    
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
iskm: k * m ≠ 0
ak:= k * n / (k * m): nat
bk:= k * n /+ (k * m): nat
a:= n / m: nat
b:= n /+ m: nat
k * n = b * k + a * (k * m)

    
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
iskm: k * m ≠ 0
ak:= k * n / (k * m): nat
bk:= k * n /+ (k * m): nat
a:= n / m: nat
b:= n /+ m: nat
k * n = b * k + a * (m * k)

    
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
iskm: k * m ≠ 0
ak:= k * n / (k * m): nat
bk:= k * n /+ (k * m): nat
a:= n / m: nat
b:= n /+ m: nat
k * n = b * k + a * m * k

    
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
iskm: k * m ≠ 0
ak:= k * n / (k * m): nat
bk:= k * n /+ (k * m): nat
a:= n / m: nat
b:= n /+ m: nat
k * n = (b + a * m) * k

    
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
iskm: k * m ≠ 0
ak:= k * n / (k * m): nat
bk:= k * n /+ (k * m): nat
a:= n / m: nat
b:= n /+ m: nat

n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
iskm: k * m ≠ 0
ak:= k * n / (k * m): nat
bk:= k * n /+ (k * m): nat
a:= n / m: nat
b:= n /+ m: nat
k * n = (n /+ m + n / m * m) * k

    
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
iskm: k * m ≠ 0
ak:= k * n / (k * m): nat
bk:= k * n /+ (k * m): nat
a:= n / m: nat
b:= n /+ m: nat
k * n = n * k

    apply (natmultcomm k n).
  
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
iskm: k * m ≠ 0
ak:= k * n / (k * m): nat
bk:= k * n /+ (k * m): nat
a:= n / m: nat
b:= n /+ m: nat
e1: bk + ak * (k * m) = b * k + a * (k * m)
ak = a × bk = k * b

  
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
iskm: k * m ≠ 0
ak:= k * n / (k * m): nat
bk:= k * n /+ (k * m): nat
a:= n / m: nat
b:= n /+ m: nat
e1: bk + ak * (k * m) = b * k + a * (k * m)
l1:= lthnatrem n m ism: n /+ m < m
ak = a × bk = k * b

  
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
iskm: k * m ≠ 0
ak:= k * n / (k * m): nat
bk:= k * n /+ (k * m): nat
a:= n / m: nat
b:= n /+ m: nat
e1: bk + ak * (k * m) = b * k + a * (k * m)
l1:= lthnatrem n m ism: n /+ m < m
l1':= natlthandmultr (n /+ m) m k
  (natneq0andmultlinv k m iskm) l1: n /+ m * k < m * k
ak = a × bk = k * b

  
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
iskm: k * m ≠ 0
ak:= k * n / (k * m): nat
bk:= k * n /+ (k * m): nat
a:= n / m: nat
b:= n /+ m: nat
e1: bk + ak * (k * m) = b * k + a * (k * m)
l1:= lthnatrem n m ism: n /+ m < m
l1': n /+ m * k < k * m
ak = a × bk = k * b

  
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
iskm: k * m ≠ 0
ak:= k * n / (k * m): nat
bk:= k * n /+ (k * m): nat
a:= n / m: nat
b:= n /+ m: nat
e1: bk + ak * (k * m) = b * k + a * (k * m)
l1:= lthnatrem n m ism: n /+ m < m
l1': n /+ m * k < k * m
int:= natdivremunique (k * m) ak 
  (k * n /+ (k * m)) a (n /+ m * k)
  (lthnatrem (k * n) (k * m) iskm) l1' e1: ak = a × k * n /+ (k * m) = n /+ m * k
ak = a × bk = k * b

  
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
iskm: k * m ≠ 0
ak:= k * n / (k * m): nat
bk:= k * n /+ (k * m): nat
a:= n / m: nat
b:= n /+ m: nat
e1: bk + ak * (k * m) = b * k + a * (k * m)
l1:= lthnatrem n m ism: n /+ m < m
l1': n /+ m * k < k * m
int:= natdivremunique (k * m) ak 
  (k * n /+ (k * m)) a (n /+ m * k)
  (lthnatrem (k * n) (k * m) iskm) l1' e1: ak = a × k * n /+ (k * m) = n /+ m * k
bk = k * b

  
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
iskm: k * m ≠ 0
ak:= k * n / (k * m): nat
bk:= k * n /+ (k * m): nat
a:= n / m: nat
b:= n /+ m: nat
e1: bk + ak * (k * m) = b * k + a * (k * m)
l1:= lthnatrem n m ism: n /+ m < m
l1': n /+ m * k < k * m
int:= natdivremunique (k * m) ak 
  (k * n /+ (k * m)) a (n /+ m * k)
  (lthnatrem (k * n) (k * m) iskm) l1' e1: ak = a × k * n /+ (k * m) = n /+ m * k
bk = b * k
 apply (pr2 int).
Defined.
Opaque natdivremandmultl.

Definition natdivandmultl (n m k : nat) (ism : m ≠ 0) (iskm : (k * m) ≠ 0) :
  paths (natdiv (k * n) (k * m)) (natdiv n m) := pr1 (natdivremandmultl _ _ _ ism iskm).

Definition natremandmultl (n m k : nat) (ism : m ≠ 0) (iskm : (k * m) ≠ 0) :
  paths (natrem (k * n) (k * m)) (k * (natrem n m)) := pr2 (natdivremandmultl _ _ _ ism iskm).


n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
ismk: m * k ≠ 0
n * k / (m * k) = n / m
× n * k /+ (m * k) = n /+ m * k


n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
ismk: m * k ≠ 0
n * k / (m * k) = n / m
× n * k /+ (m * k) = n /+ m * k

  
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
ismk: m * k ≠ 0
n * k / (m * k) = n / m
× n * k /+ (m * k) = n /+ m * k
 
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
ismk: m * k ≠ 0
n * k / (k * m) = n / m
× n * k /+ (k * m) = n /+ m * k
 
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
ismk: k * m ≠ 0
n * k / (k * m) = n / m
× n * k /+ (k * m) = n /+ m * k

  
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
ismk: k * m ≠ 0
k * n / (k * m) = n / m
× k * n /+ (k * m) = n /+ m * k
 
n, m, k: nat
ism: m ≠ 0
ismk: k * m ≠ 0
k * n / (k * m) = n / m
× k * n /+ (k * m) = k * (n /+ m)

  apply (natdivremandmultl _ _ _ ism ismk).
Defined.
Opaque natdivremandmultr.

Definition natdivandmultr (n m k : nat) (ism : m ≠ 0) (ismk : (m * k) ≠ 0) :
  paths (natdiv (n * k) (m * k)) (natdiv n m) := pr1 (natdivremandmultr _ _ _ ism ismk).

Definition natremandmultr (n m k : nat) (ism : m ≠ 0) (ismk : (m * k) ≠ 0) :
  natrem (n * k) (m * k) = (natrem n m) * k := pr2 (natdivremandmultr _ _ _ ism ismk).


(** *** Exponentiation [natpower n m] ("n to the power m") on [nat] *)

Fixpoint natpower (n m : nat) : nat :=
  match m with
  | O => 1
  | S m' => n * (natpower n m')
  end.


(** *** Factorial on [nat] *)

Fixpoint factorial (n : nat) : nat :=
  match n with
  | 0 => 1
  | S n' => (S n') * (factorial n')
  end.


(** ** The order-preserving functions [di i : nat -> nat] whose image is the complement of one element [i]. *)

Definition di (i : nat) (x : nat) : nat :=
  match natlthorgeh x i with
  | ii1 _ => x
  | ii2 _ => S x
  end.


i, x: nat
x < i → di i x = x


i, x: nat
x < i → di i x = x

  
i, x: nat
lt: x < i
di i x = x
 
i, x: nat
lt: x < i
match natlthorgeh x i with
| inl _ => x
| inr _ => S x
end = x

  
i, x: nat
lt: x < i
x = x
i, x: nat
lt: x < i
P: x ≥ i
S x = x

  
i, x: nat
lt: x < i
x = x
 apply idpath.
  
i, x: nat
lt: x < i
P: x ≥ i
S x = x
 
i, x: nat
lt: x < i
P: x ≥ i
∅
 exact (natgehtonegnatlth _ _ P lt).
Defined.


i, x: nat
x ≥ i → di i x = S x


i, x: nat
x ≥ i → di i x = S x

  
i, x: nat
lt: x ≥ i
di i x = S x
 
i, x: nat
lt: x ≥ i
match natlthorgeh x i with
| inl _ => x
| inr _ => S x
end = S x

  
i, x: nat
lt: x ≥ i
P: x < i
x = S x

S x = S x

  
i, x: nat
lt: x ≥ i
P: x < i
x = S x
 
i, x: nat
lt: x ≥ i
P: x < i
∅
 exact (natlthtonegnatgeh _ _ P lt).
  
i, x: nat
lt: x ≥ i
S x = S x
 apply idpath.
Defined.


i, x: nat
i ≠ di i x


i, x: nat
i ≠ di i x

  
i, x: nat
i ≠ di i x

i != di i x
 
i, x: nat
eq: i = di i x
∅

  
i, x: nat
eq: i =
match natlthorgeh x i with
| inl _ => x
| inr _ => S x
end
∅
 
i, x: nat
lt: x < i
eq: i = x
∅
i, x: nat
ge: x ≥ i
eq: i = S x
∅

  
i, x: nat
lt: x < i
eq: i = x
∅
 
i: nat
lt: i < i
∅
 exact (isirreflnatlth i lt).
  
i, x: nat
ge: x ≥ i
eq: i = S x
∅
 
x: nat
ge: x ≥ S x
∅
 exact (negnatgehnsn _ ge).
Defined.


i, n: nat
di i n ≤ S n


i, n: nat
di i n ≤ S n

  
i, n: nat
di i n ≤ S n
 
i, n: nat
match natlthorgeh n i with
| inl _ => n
| inr _ => S n
end ≤ S n
 
i, n: nat
a: n < i
n ≤ S n
i, n: nat
b: n ≥ i
S n ≤ S n

  
i, n: nat
a: n < i
n ≤ S n
 
i, n: nat
a: n < i
n < S n
 apply natlthnsn.
  
i, n: nat
b: n ≥ i
S n ≤ S n
 apply isreflnatleh.
Defined.


i, n: nat
di i n ≥ n


i, n: nat
di i n ≥ n

  
i, n: nat
di i n ≥ n
 
i, n: nat
match natlthorgeh n i with
| inl _ => n
| inr _ => S n
end ≥ n

a: n < i
n ≥ n

b: n ≥ i
S n ≥ n

i, n: nat
b: n ≥ i
S n ≥ n
 
i, n: nat
b: n ≥ i
n < S n
 apply natlthnsn.
Defined.


i: nat
isincl (di i)


i: nat
isincl (di i)

  
i, y: nat
isofhlevel 1 (hfiber (di i) y)
 
i, y: nat
∏ x x' : nat, di i x = di i x' → x = x'

  
i, y, x, x': nat
di i x = di i x' → x = x'
 
i, y, x, x': nat
match natlthorgeh x i with
| inl _ => x
| inr _ => S x
end =
match natlthorgeh x' i with
| inl _ => x'
| inr _ => S x'
end → x = x'
 
i, y, x, x': nat
e: match natlthorgeh x i with
| inl _ => x
| inr _ => S x
end =
match natlthorgeh x' i with
| inl _ => x'
| inr _ => S x'
end
x = x'

  
i, y, x, x': nat
l: x < i
e: x =
match natlthorgeh x' i with
| inl _ => x'
| inr _ => S x'
end
x = x'
i, y, x, x': nat
nel: x ≥ i
e: S x =
match natlthorgeh x' i with
| inl _ => x'
| inr _ => S x'
end
x = x'

  
i, y, x, x': nat
l: x < i
e: x =
match natlthorgeh x' i with
| inl _ => x'
| inr _ => S x'
end
x = x'

l: x < i
l': x' < i
e: x = x'
x = x'

l: x < i
nel': x' ≥ i
e: x = S x'
x = x'
