l: x < i
l': x' < i
e: x = x'
x = x'
 apply e.
    
i, y, x, x': nat
l: x < i
nel': x' ≥ i
e: x = S x'
x = x'
 
i, y, x, x': nat
l: S x' < i
nel': x' ≥ i
e: x = S x'
x = x'
 
i, y, x, x': nat
l: S x' < i
nel': x' ≥ i
e: x = S x'
e': S i > S x'
x = x'

      
i, y, x, x': nat
l: S x' < i
nel': x' ≥ i
e: x = S x'
e': i > x'
x = x'

      contradicts (natlehtonegnatgth _ _ nel') e'.
  
i, y, x, x': nat
nel: x ≥ i
e: S x =
match natlthorgeh x' i with
| inl _ => x'
| inr _ => S x'
end
x = x'
 
i, y, x, x': nat
nel: x ≥ i
l': x' < i
e: S x = x'
x = x'
i, y, x, x': nat
nel: x ≥ i
nel': x' ≥ i
e: S x = S x'
x = x'

    
i, y, x, x': nat
nel: x ≥ i
l': x' < i
e: S x = x'
x = x'
 
i, y, x: nat
nel: x ≥ i
l': S x < i
x = S x

      
i, y, x: nat
nel: x ≥ i
l': S x < i
e':= natgthtogths i (S x) l': S i > S x
x = S x

      contradicts (natlehtonegnatgth _ _ nel) e'.
    
i, y, x, x': nat
nel: x ≥ i
nel': x' ≥ i
e: S x = S x'
x = x'
 apply (invmaponpathsS _ _ e).
Defined.

| inr _ => S j
end = i

∅

S j = S j

g: S j ≥ S i

 contradicts (natlehtonegnatgth _ _ g) l'.
      
i, j: nat
ne: i ≠ S j
nel: S j ≥ i
g: S j ≥ S i
g': j ≥ i
S j = S j
 apply idpath.
    
i, j: nat
ne: i ≠ j
nel: j ≥ i
e: j = i
hfiber (di i) j
 induction ((nat_neq_to_nopath ne) (pathsinv0 e)).
Defined.

  apply (neghfiberdi i).

hfiber (di i) j ⨿ ¬ hfiber (di i) j
 
i, j: nat

 apply (pr1 (iscontrhfiberdi i j neq)).
Defined.


(** ** The order-preserving functions [si i : nat -> nat] that take the value [i] twice. *)

Definition si (i : nat) (x : nat) : nat :=
  match natlthorgeh i x with
    | ii1 _ => x - 1
    | ii2 _ => x
  end.


i, j: nat
i ≤ j → i ≠ j → i < j


i, j: nat
i ≤ j → i ≠ j → i < j

  
i, j: nat
le: i ≤ j
ne: i ≠ j
i < j

  
i, j: nat
le: i ≤ j
ne: i ≠ j
lt: i < j
i < j
i, j: nat
le: i ≤ j
ne: i ≠ j
eq: i = j
i < j

  
i, j: nat
le: i ≤ j
ne: i ≠ j
lt: i < j
i < j
 exact lt.
  
i, j: nat
le: i ≤ j
ne: i ≠ j
eq: i = j
i < j
 
i: nat
le: i ≤ i
ne: i ≠ i
i < i
 
i: nat
le: i ≤ i
ne: i ≠ i
∅
 exact (isirrefl_natneq _ ne).
Defined.

(* more lemmas about natural numbers *)


n, i, j: nat
n - i - j = n - (i + j)


n, i, j: nat
n - i - j = n - (i + j)

  
∏ i j : nat, 0 - i - j = 0 - (i + j)
n: nat
N: ∏ i j : nat, n - i - j = n - (i + j)
∏ i j : nat, S n - i - j = S n - (i + j)

  
∏ i j : nat, 0 - i - j = 0 - (i + j)
 
i, j: nat
0 - i - j = 0 - (i + j)
 apply idpath.
  
n: nat
N: ∏ i j : nat, n - i - j = n - (i + j)
∏ i j : nat, S n - i - j = S n - (i + j)
 
n: nat
N: ∏ i j : nat, n - i - j = n - (i + j)
∏ j : nat, S n - 0 - j = S n - (0 + j)
n: nat
N: ∏ i j : nat, n - i - j = n - (i + j)
i: nat
∏ j : nat, S n - S i - j = S n - (S i + j)

    
n: nat
N: ∏ i j : nat, n - i - j = n - (i + j)
∏ j : nat, S n - 0 - j = S n - (0 + j)
 
n: nat
N: ∏ i j : nat, n - i - j = n - (i + j)
j: nat
S n - 0 - j = S n - (0 + j)
 apply idpath.
    
n: nat
N: ∏ i j : nat, n - i - j = n - (i + j)
i: nat
∏ j : nat, S n - S i - j = S n - (S i + j)
 apply N.
Defined.

n, m, i: nat
i < n + m → i ≥ n → i - n < m


n, m, i: nat
i < n + m → i ≥ n → i - n < m

  
n, m, i: nat
p: i < n + m
H: i ≥ n
i - n < m

  
n, m, i: nat
p: i < n + m
H: i ≥ n
i - n < m + n - n

p: i < n + m
H: i ≥ n
i < m + n
n, m, i: nat
p: i < n + m
H: i ≥ n
n < m + n

p: i < n + m
H: i ≥ n
i < m + n

H: i ≥ n
i < n + m
 exact p.
  
n, m, i: nat
p: i < n + m
H: i ≥ n
n < m + n

p: i < n + m
H: i ≥ n
n < n + m

H: i ≥ n
n ≤ i
n, m, i: nat
p: i < n + m
H: i ≥ n
i < n + m

p: i < n + m

n ≤ i
 assumption.
    
n, m, i: nat
p: i < n + m
H: i ≥ n
i < n + m
 assumption.
Defined.


a, b, c: nat
b ≥ c → a + (b - c) = a + b - c


a, b, c: nat
b ≥ c → a + (b - c) = a + b - c

  
a, b, c: nat
e: b ≥ c
a + (b - c) = a + b - c
 
a, b, c: nat
e: b ≥ c
E: b - c + c = b
a + (b - c) = a + b - c
 
a, b, c: nat
e: b ≥ c
E: b - c + c = b
a + (b - c + c - c) = a + (b - c + c) - c
 
a, b, c: nat
a + (b - c + c - c) = a + (b - c + c) - c

  
a, b, c: nat
a + (b - c + c - c) = a + (b - c) + c - c
 
a, b, c: nat
a + (b - c) = a + (b - c) + c - c
 
a, b, c: nat
a + (b - c) = a + (b - c)
 apply idpath.
Defined.


a, b, c: nat
a ≥ b → b ≥ c → a - c = a - b + (b - c)


a, b, c: nat
a ≥ b → b ≥ c → a - c = a - b + (b - c)

  
a, b, c: nat
r: a ≥ b
s: b ≥ c
a - c = a - b + (b - c)
 
a, b, c: nat
r: a ≥ b
s: b ≥ c
a - c + c = a - b + (b - c) + c
 
a, b, c: nat
r: a ≥ b
s: b ≥ c
a - c + c = a - b + (b - c + c)

  
a, b, c: nat
r: a ≥ b
s: b ≥ c
a - c + c = a - b + b
 
a, b, c: nat
r: a ≥ b
s: b ≥ c
a = a - b + b

  exact (! minusplusnmm _ _ r).
Defined.
